tours.title: Albanian Alps & Theth Village Day Tour
tours.description:
Experience a one-of-a-kind journey with this tour, offering travelers the chance to explore the Albanian Alps and the hidden village within the mountains in a single day. Surrounding Theth village are captivating natural wonders awaiting exploration.

Find the Blue Eye of Theth, hidden in the mountains that surround the village. Embark on a picturesque hike through the jungle, tracing the river for approximately 45 minutes until you reach the secret Blue Eye. Enjoy your time in the magical forest by the river.

A true exploration adventure! Additionally, delve into the region's intriguing history with visits to the historic, Church of Theth, and its iconic Reconciliation Tower. Don't miss this tour, you will remember this day forever!
included: Hotel pick up and drop off (or nearby)
Comfortable transportation with all necessary amenities
Guided hike to the Blue Eye

tours.title: Berat City and Apollonia Park Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour gives travelers the opportunity to explore two different periods in Albanian history: Classical antiquity in Apollonia and Medieval times in Berat.

Immerse yourself in the heart of the country, from exploring the ottoman-built neighborhoods of Berat to mostly Byzantine built castle of Berat to the Greek colony – Roman city of Apollonia. Enjoy a traditional meal with the view of famous 1001 Windows!
included: Entrance fee to Apollonia Archeological Park

tours.title: Bovilla Lake And Kruja City Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour is unique because it combines the natural beauty of Albania with it's cultural and historic part. The hike to mount Gamti in Bovilla lake is done partially by car. After finishing the small hike, free coffee is served to restore our energies.

A guided tour to Kruja is followed after Bovilla. Regarded as the old capital of Albania, Kruja is one of the most important and historic cities of the nation. As a bonus for nature enthusiast, we will end our tour in Sari Salltik, the peak of Kruja mountain, where Tirana, Kruja, Durres and the Adriatic sea will be in the palm of our hands...

tours.title: Dajti Cable Car and Shengjergj Waterfall Day Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable half-day adventure in Tirana, featuring a scenic ride on the Dajti cable car, a hike to the stunning Shengjergj Waterfall, and a delicious traditional lunch. Experience the perfect blend of outdoor exploration and local flavors in this unique tour.
included: Comfortable transportation with all necessary amenities
Guided hike to Shen Gjergji Waterfall

tours.title: Tirana E-Bike Day Tour
tours.description: We start our exploring day, in the city center, the E-bikes and the Guide will be ready. We will have a moment to adapt the bikes for more comfort during the ride.

tours.title: Gjirokastra & Blue Eye Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour is unique because it mixes the rich history and culture of Albania with its wonderful nature wonders all in a single day. Explore the unique UNESCO protected Gjirokastra city and the Blue Eye.

With the exclusivity of a private tour, our dedicated guide will cater to your every need, ensuring your experience is personalized and tailored to your preferences. A traditional Albanian lunch is included in the itinerary.

Additionally, enhance your journey by choosing from optional add-ons such as a visit to Apollonia or a return trip along the scenic Riviera.
included: Guided Tour of Gjirokastra Caste and Town

tours.title: North Macedonia: Ohrid & Saint Naum Day Tour
tours.description:
Our journey begins in the historic city of Ohrid, where time seems frozen in its enchanting streets. Famous for its 365 churches, each showcasing influences from the Roman to Ottoman eras, Ohrid offers stunning viewpoints, ancient castles, and a rich cultural experience.

We then drive along the scenic lake perimeter to the 1200-year-old Saint Naum Monastery. This architectural marvel stands as a testament to enduring beauty and history.

Crossing into Albania, we pause at Drilon Park, a tranquil haven where the Drilon River flows gracefully into Lake Ohrid, creating a serene ecosystem adorned with swans.

Our final destination is the charming old town of Lin, perched on a peninsula along Lake Ohrid’s western shores. With its medieval houses and breathtaking views from Mount Qafe Thane, Lin provides a picturesque conclusion to our adventure before returning to Tirana.
included: Pick up and drop off near your hotel
Guided tour of Ohrid Old Town

tours.title: Saranda & Ksamil Islands Day Tour
tours.description: Embark on a memorable coastal adventure in Saranda, where you can soak in the town’s lively atmosphere, seaside promenade, and stunning Ionian views. Continue your journey to Ksamil, famous for its crystal-clear turquoise waters and pristine beaches, offering the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Conclude the experience with a visit to the breathtaking Blue Eye spring, where you can enjoy a refreshing swim in its crystal-blue waters surrounded by unspoiled nature.
included: Hotel Pick and drop off at or near your hotel
Entrance ticket to the Blue Eye spring

tours.title: Full Balkan Experience: A 10 Day Tour
tours.description: This tour stands out because it gives travelers the opportunity to see how the Eastern European culture and history has developed in 6 different countries in a time efficent 10 day tour. Travelers will witness how Ancient Greece, the Roman Empire, Slavic culture, and the Ottoman Empire have shaped society over the centuries. This journey will explore the major sites that highlight the rich history of each country.

tours.title: Kosovo: Prizren & Prishtina Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour gives travellers the opportunity to explore and understand how the Albanian culture, history and identity have evolved in Albania's twin country, Kosovo.
You will visit the cultural capital (Prizren), exploring important historic landmarks along with the castle of Prizren up the hill and the capital city (Prishtina) where you will understand the geo-political situation of Kosovo and explore the vibrant city centre.

tours.title: Montenegro: Budva & Kotor Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour is truly unique, offering travelers the chance to explore the highlights of an entirely different country in just one day from Tirana.

Visit the stunning coastal towns of Budva and Kotor, two medieval cities with rich Venetian heritage. Kotor, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, and Budva, with its charming old town, provide a captivating glimpse into Montenegrin culture and the country’s breathtaking beauty.

tours.title: Visit The Balkans In 3 Days
tours.description:
This tour is unique because it gives you the opportunity to see the best of three countries in three days. This is the best choice for travelers who are interested in seeing how the Albanian culture changes and is developed differently in every region.

This tour gives you the opportunity to visit 2 capital cities, 2 UNESCO world heritage cities and 2 very important historic cities where pivotal events unfolded, shaping the course of history.

tours.title: Visit The Balkans In 6 Days
tours.description:
Embark on a memorable 6-day journey through the heart of the Balkans, where history, culture, and nature come together. Starting in Albania, the tour will take you to iconic landmarks such as the ancient Apollonia ruins and the stone city of Gjirokastra.

In North Macedonia, explore the picturesque town of Ohrid and its ancient treasures.

The tour continues through Kosovo, where you'll experience the capitals of Skopje and Prishtina, before concluding in the cultural cities of Peja, Prizren, and Kruja. This immersive adventure offers a perfect blend of historical exploration, natural beauty, and local traditions.

tours.title: All Of Albania In 8 Days
tours.description:
This tour is crafted to immerse you in Albania's rich culture, history, nature, and traditions. Explore the majestic northern mountains, home to breathtaking landscapes and natural wonders, before heading south to the pristine, crystal-clear waters of the Albanian Riviera. Visit UNESCO-protected historical sites, each telling its own story, and discover local vineyards where traditional beverages like raki are produced.

Experience the vibrant culture of central Albania, from its historic towns to its welcoming communities. Stay active with hiking, boat tours, and wine tastings, making for an unforgettable journey. By the end of this trip, you won’t just have visited Albania—you’ll feel like a true Albanian!

tours.title: Full Albanian Experience: A 10 Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour stands out for its ability to provide travelers with a FULL Albanian experience, encompassing the breathtaking natural wonders of Albania, the rich tapestry of Albanian culture and historical landmarks, traditional cuisine, beverages, and attire.

Participants will have the opportunity to meet a local family residing in Berat Castle, among numerous other memorable experiences.

The tour meticulously covers all major tourist attractions in Albania, along with hidden gems known only to our expert local guides. For those seeking to immerse themselves fully in Albanian life, this tour offers an unparalleled opportunity.

tours.title: North & South Albania: A 5 Day Tour
tours.description:
This tour is unique because it offers you the most efficient way to visit all of Albania. You will visit the best tourist destinations in Albania without wasting time at less important sites.

You will have enough time to fully immerse yourself in the destinations, ensuring a comprehensive experience all within a remarkably time-efficient 5-day journey. According to our statistics, this duration strikes the perfect balance, offering you the most effective way to discover the diverse beauty of Albania.

tours.title: North Albania In 2 Days
tours.description:
Venture into the stunning Albanian Alps for a full nature exploration adventure. Begin in Shkodra, the cultural capital of the north, and soak in the lively atmosphere of this charming city.

Then, enjoy a scenic drive through picturesque landscapes as you ascend to the heart of the Albanian Alps. The following day, embark on an unforgettable adventure exploring the breathtaking nature of Theth Valley, discovering its stunning views and unique beauty.

tours.title: North Albania in 3 Days
tours.description:
Embark on a nature adventure tour that enables you to experience the best parts of the Albanian Alps in 3 Days.

In this tour you will experience the coldest water in Albania, the highest road in Albania, the most beautiful nature wonder, an amazing hike in the forest, the 400 year old legal court of the north tribes, a boat tour across a mountain river, a secluded village in Theth valley, a first hand experience on the mountain culture and history of Albania and much more…

tours.title: Tour Of South Albania 4 Days
tours.description:
This tour offers a wonderful blend of culture and history exploration with relaxing days in the beaches of the Albanian Riviera. Embark on an adventure exploring the South-West part of Albania where all the UNESCO culture heritage sites are along with the most beautiful shorelines of Europe.

You will learn about the history of Albania from Classical Antiquity to the Medieval Period. Each day, enjoy traditional local food and beverages, explore picturesque sites, and unwind on the beautiful beaches of the renowned Albanian Riviera.

tours.title: Long Weekend In Albania
tours.description: If you are looking for a cheap weekend away, fully organized and filled with activities, this is the perfect choice for you. Starting every Thursday and Friday, you can join us on our group adventure to Albania! Including a walking tour of the capital city, a welcome dinner with live folk music at Albania’s most famous traditional restaurant, a cultural visit to the City of 1001 Windows, an unforgettable nature adventure in the Albanian Alps and a visit to the most beautiful lake in Albania, this tour is designed to give you an affordable escape from everyday life. From airport pick-up to airport drop-off this adventure is coordinated fully by our guides and travel agents, so you don’t have to worry about a thing. You’ll enjoy traveling in a group, sharing experiences, and building lifelong friendships along the way.

tours.title: Albania & Kosovo In 5 Days
tours.description: Embark on a 5 day adventure from Tirana to Prishtina, exploring the highlights of the Albanian lands and learning about how the history and culture of Albanians have developed in each of the countries.

tours.title: Albania 6 Day Hike Tour
tours.description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure along the Albanian Alps. This adventure is designed for travelers who want to visit only the best - top rated locations on the northern Albanian mountains on a fully guided hiking tour. Get hypnotisedby magical nature wonders such as: The Blue Eye of Theth, Grunas Waterfall, The peaks of the Accursed mountains, Valbona National Park, Shala River and Komani Lake.

tours.title: Tour of Yugoslavia in 12 Days
tours.description:
Embark on a journey through the heart of the Balkans as you explore the lands that once formed the former Yugoslavia. This immersive tour takes you across a region rich in history, culture, and breathtaking natural beauty.

From the sun-soaked Adriatic shores of Croatia and Montenegro to the vibrant cultural hubs of Serbia, Slovenia, Bosnia & Herzegovina, North Macedonia, and Kosovo, this journey blends history with breathtaking nature, authentic traditions, and the warmth of Balkan hospitality.

Experience medieval fortresses, UNESCO-listed old towns, crystal-clear lakes, lively squares, and flavors that reflect centuries of shared heritage

tours.title: All the Balkan Countries: A 16 Day Private Tour
tours.description:
This tour is special because it offers you the opportunity to visit EVERY Balkan country, all in 1 trip.

You will explore and dive deep into the culture of the Balkan region and understand how history, traditions, ethnicities evolved all together as time went on.

Enjoy the highlights of each country from Bulgaria to Slovenia and a perfect blend of nature, culture, history, traditions, and local cuisine.

tours.title: East Balkans: Albania to Romania in 14 Days
Albania – Macedonia – Kosovo – Montenegro 6 Day Tour
tours.description:
Embark on a memorable 6-day journey through the heart of the Balkans, where history, culture, and nature come together. Starting in Albania, the tour will take you to iconic landmarks such as the ancient Apollonia ruins and the stone city of Gjirokastra.

In North Macedonia, explore the picturesque town of Ohrid and its ancient treasures.

The tour continues through Kosovo, where you'll experience the capitals of Skopje and Prishtina, before concluding in the cultural cities of Peja, Prizren, and Kruja. This immersive adventure offers a perfect blend of historical exploration, natural beauty, and local traditions.

tours.title: Berat City Day Tour from Tirana
tours.description: Discover the timeless charm of Berat on a guided day trip from Tirana, featuring a visit to the impressive 2,500-year-old Berat Castle, Berat Old Towns and Belshi Lake. Walk through centuries of history as you explore this UNESCO-listed fortress, still home to local residents, and enjoy panoramic views over the city and Osum River. Continue your journey through the Mangalemi and Gorica neighborhoods, famous for their Ottoman-era architecture, stone bridges, and cultural landmarks, while learning about Berat’s unique heritage and traditions from your guide.
included: Comfortable transportation with all necessary amenities

tours.title: Bovilla Lake & Gamti Mountain Hike Day Tour
tours.description:
Admire the majestic mountain peaks, lush landscapes, and the tranquil waters of Lake Bovilla on this
guided hike along the Gamti Mountain trail. Breathe in Albania’s crisp mountain air as you set off from
Tirana on a scenic adventure. Take in the serene beauty of the lake and its impressive dam, framed by
dramatic mountain backdrops.

As you hike, each turn reveals a new, awe-inspiring view, offering a deep
connection with nature in its purest form. Enjoy a perfect blend of leisure and discovery, with plenty of
opportunities for photography enthusiasts to capture the breathtaking scenery.

Conclude your journey
from a stunning viewpoint, where you can unwind while admiring the panoramic lake and mountain
vistas.
included: Hotel Pick up / Drop off (max walking distance 10 min depending on logistics

tours.title: Shkodra City, Rozafa Castle & Mesi Bridge Day Tour
tours.description: Discover the highlights of Shkodra on a guided tour from Tirana. Visit the ancient Rozafa Castle and take in the panoramic views of the city and surrounding landscape. Stroll along the charming Gjuhadol pedestrian street and admire the historic Mesi Bridge. Complete the experience with a visit of the scenic Shkodra Lake. Traditional lunch by the lake option available.
included: Free time in Shkodra boulevard and lake

itineraries.title: Gjuhadol, Shkodra City Center
itineraries.description: • The instructor will rendezvous with you at your chosen time and location, where a car will be waiting to kick off the adventure. Midway through the journey to the Albanian Alps and Theth, make a brief stop in Shkodra for a coffee break.

itineraries.title: Qafe Thore, Albanian Alps
itineraries.description:
• Before we arrive to Theth, we will stop along the mountain ranges of Albanian Alpes. You will see there a picturesque mountain view, a breathtaking scene that captivates the senses and will fill your hearts with awe and wonder.
  • Imagine standing at a vantage point, surrounded by majestic peaks stretching into the distance, painting a stunning natural panorama.

itineraries.title: The Blue Eye of Theth
itineraries.description:
• Arriving in Theth Valley signals the commencement of your nature exploration in this picturesque region. We will continue the journey to the beautiful blue eye. There will be a 45- minute hike (2.5KM).
  • During the hike you will have several beautiful sightseeing stops and water pools. At the finish, you will experience the most magical and beautiful place in Albania. Hidden in the mountains you will find The Blue Eye of Theth. With refreshing air and water temperatures we are going to spend around 2 hours there.
  • Indulge in a delightful lunch featuring traditional North Albanian cuisine.

itineraries.title: Theth Village
itineraries.description:
• Next, you’ll arrive at the picturesque mountain village of Theth. Take time to explore the traditional homes and interact with the local domestic animals.
  • Visit the iconic Church of Theth and the Reconciliation Tower, a cultural hub for the northern Albanian tribes.

itineraries.title: Journey to Berat: UNESCO "City of a Thousand Windows"
itineraries.description:
• Commute: The journey starts with a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Berat.
  • Berat Castle: Ascend the hill for a walking tour of the 13th-century fortress, learning the history of the ancient city and visiting its various sites, which still contain inhabited houses, churches, and mosque ruins.
  • Mangalemi Neighborhood: Descend to the city center and explore this renowned historic quarter, famous for its white Ottoman-era houses with numerous windows that seem to be stacked on top of each other, giving Berat its nickname.
  • City Center Landmarks: Explore significant downtown landmarks, including the city gate, the former Pasha's residence, The Sultan's Mosque, and Berat's bustling boulevard.

itineraries.title: Osumi River and Gorica Bridge
itineraries.description:
• Gorica Bridge and Neighborhood: Pass by and explore the famous, historic Gorica Bridge (a symbol of the city), which connects the Mangalemi quarter to the old Gorica neighborhood across the Osumi River.
  • Traditional Lunch: Enjoy a traditional Albanian lunch by the Osumi River, offering a great view of the city.

itineraries.title: Journey to Apollonia Archaeological Park
itineraries.description:
• Apollonia Departure: Depart Berat for Apollonia, an ancient Greek trade colony and a vital center for education, philosophy, and arts in antiquity.
  • Apollonia Exploration: Explore the expansive ancient archaeological park and visit several key landmarks within the ruins, which contain Greek, Roman, and medieval heritage.
  • Key Archaeological Sites: Tour specific ruins, which may include the Temple of Apollonia (Temple of Artemis), the Monument of Agonothetes (town hall portal), the Amphitheatre/Odeon, the Triumph Arch, and the Archaeological Museum housed within a 13th-century monastery.
  • Return Journey: Travel back to your original location, concluding the tour.

itineraries.title: Lake Bovilla
itineraries.description:
• You will experience one of the most fascinating views in Albania. The turquois waters of the lake combined with the lush of greenery from the steep hill created a breathtaking view.
  • Unlike other tours, we drive up the mountain with a car until the road comes to an end. Following a 15 minutes hike, we reach the top of mount Gamti.
  • Having absorbed the breathtaking views from the mountain's apex, we descend to a charming mountainside coffee spot. Here, we'll pause to restore our energy with a coffee before resuming our journey towards Kruja

itineraries.title: Kruja Bazaar
itineraries.description:
• Our first stop in Kruja city will be in it's 500 years old bazaar. The Ottoman-style bazaar stretches all the way from middle of Krujë to the Krujë Castle.
  • It consists of a single cobblestone street along which all sorts of vendors sell their goods from wooden stalls.

itineraries.title: Kruja Castle
itineraries.description: • The bazaar of Kruja will lead us into the Castle of Kruja. The walls of the castle hold the history of 1500 years of war and peace. Starting a walking tour inside the castle, we will visit several spots like: The Scanderbeg's tree, -The secret tunnel of the castle , -Old residences of the castle, -Mosque of Sultan Mehmet, -The watch tower of the castle, -The top of the castle and many more....

itineraries.title: Sari Salltik
itineraries.description: • Before this tour comes to an end, we will drive up the mountain of Kruja to the very top, where the Sari Salltik cave is found. The cave serves as a religious place for practicing Bektashi religion and it has an ultimate view, seeing Tirana, Kruja, Durres and Adriatic sea all together.

itineraries.title: The Ascent to Dajti National Park
itineraries.description:
• Morning Pickup: Begin your adventure with a convenient pickup from your hotel or preferred location in Tirana.
  • Balkan’s Longest Cable Car: Experience a breathtaking ride on the Dajti Ekspres, the longest cable car in the Balkans, offering a panoramic 360-degree view of the capital city.
  • Mountain Exploration: Discover Dajti National Park at 1,200 meters above sea level, enjoying the crisp mountain air and the natural terrace overlooking the Adriatic Sea in the distance.

itineraries.title: The Scenic Back-Mountain Route
itineraries.description:
• Off-the-Beaten-Path Drive: Depart the main park area and travel along the winding roads on the rear side of the mountain, where the landscape shifts into dramatic, rugged scenery.
  • Panoramic Views: Take in the awe-inspiring vistas that unfold along the roadside, far away from the city's hustle and bustle.

itineraries.title: The Trek to Shëngjergji Waterfall
itineraries.description:
• Forest Hike: Embark on a moderate 20-minute hike through a lush forest trail to locate the "elusive" Shëngjergji Waterfall.
  • Natural Immersion: Explore the rich flora and fauna surrounding the falls, taking in the vibrant colors and sounds of the deep woods.
  • Serene Refreshment: Reach the pristine waterfall and enjoy the opportunity to immerse yourself in its refreshing, cool waters while relaxing in a truly tranquil setting.

itineraries.title: Exploring Tirana
itineraries.description: • E-bike day in Tirana surroundings, we will be passing near the pyramid of Tirana and climb the stairs to have a great upper view of the capital, we will enter in the Bloc area, (the place reserved for the communist leaders of Albania during the regime) than we pedal at the artificial lake park and the hills around the city.

itineraries.title: Picnic near Farka Lake
itineraries.description: • We stop at the Farka Lake for a picnic near this beautiful and peaceful place, than we head back towards the Capital city to end our amazing day.

itineraries.title: Discover the Heart of Gjirokastra: The Vibrant Bazaar Experience"
itineraries.description: • Our first stop upon arriving in Gjirokastra will be the bustling Gjirokastra Bazaar, a vibrant marketplace where local crafts, textiles, and traditional Albanian products beckon visitors.

itineraries.title: Journey to the Majestic Gjirokastra Castle
itineraries.description: • After exploring the bazaar, we'll ascend the winding road leading to the magnificent Gjirokastra Castle, a true architectural marvel.

itineraries.title: Inside the Castle Walls
itineraries.description: • Within its walls, we'll discover the castle's museum and the castle's notorious old prison.

itineraries.title: To the Clock Tower
itineraries.description: • Continuing our journey within the castle, we'll make our way to its highest point, where the iconic clock tower is located.

itineraries.title: Step Inside Zekate House
itineraries.description: • A last stop is made in the Zekate House, a local fortress house where you can learn how the rich families used to live back in the day.

itineraries.title: A Hidden Gem in the Forest
itineraries.description: • A mere 30 kilometers from Gjirokaster, a hidden gem awaits us within the heart of the forest.

itineraries.title: The Magic of the Blue Eye
itineraries.description: • We will conclude the tour with the exploration of the awe-inspiring natural wonder of the Blue Eye.

itineraries.title: Ohrid, The City of 365 Churches
itineraries.description:
• Your journey begins in Tirana with your tour leader picking you up at the agreed time and location. Your first stop will be Ohrid, a city that seems untouched by time. Ohrid boasts a history that stretches back to ancient Hellenistic times, passing through the eras of the Roman Empire and the Ottoman Empire. With is its remarkable fusion of Orthodox and Islamic architecture and with an astounding number of 365 churches, each symbolizing a day of the year, Ohrid is truly unique.
  • As you stroll through the enchanting streets of the old town, you will explore the main churches, such as Saint Sophia, Saint Jovani, and Saint Clement. You'll also marvel at the medieval Samoil Fortress, visit the National Workshop for handmade paper, and immerse ourselves in the rich culture at the Ohrid Amphitheatre, among other captivating experiences that await you in this remarkable city.
  • Following a lakeside lunch to recharge your energy, you will continue our journey to Saint Naum.

itineraries.title: The Bay of Bones
itineraries.description: • You will make a short pit stop at the Bay of Bones for photos and a bit of history.

itineraries.title: The Monastery of Saint Naum
itineraries.description: • While driving along the perimeter of Ohrid Lake , you will soon encounter the Saint Naum Monastery. As you admire the ancient Byzantine architecture that has stood for a thousand years, you'll proceed to explore the monastery's interior. Inside, you will pay a visit to the central church of the monastery and relish the picturesque view of the lake from this vantage point. For nature enthusiasts, the monastery also houses captivating peacocks, adding to its overall charm and beauty.

itineraries.title: Drilon National Park
itineraries.description: • Shortly after leaving Lin Village, you'll arrive at Drilon Park. Here, you can savor a brief coffee break by the tranquil Drilon River, surrounded by graceful swans and the stunning beauty of nature.

itineraries.title: Lin Town
itineraries.description: • As you ascend towards Mount Qafe Thana, we will encounter Lin Village. The breathtaking vista of the village and the adjacent lake makes it an ideal spot for capturing memorable photographs and creating cherished memories. Return to Tirana.

itineraries.title: Journey South from Tirana Through Albania
itineraries.description: Embark on your journey from Tirana, traveling south through Albania’s captivating and ever-changing landscapes, where rolling hills, charming villages, and scenic countryside set the tone for the adventure ahead.

itineraries.title: Discover Ksamil: Albania's Southern Gem
itineraries.description: Continue your adventure as you travel to the southernmost edge of Albania. Immerse yourself in the beauty of the charming village of Ksamil, known for its stunning islands that boast captivating landscapes and crystal-clear waters.

itineraries.title: Relax for 2 Hours by Ksamil's Three Islands
itineraries.description: Enjoy 2 hours of beach time in front of the three islands of Ksamil.

itineraries.title: Discover Saranda: Explore the Boulevard
itineraries.description: Visit Saranda, the capital of South Albania. Enjoy a walk in the boulevard of Saranda and a traditional lunch in Sarandas most special restaurant.

itineraries.title: Stop by Saranda's Blue Eye on Your Return
itineraries.description: Drive back and stop by The Blue Eye of Saranda.

itineraries.title: Discover the Hidden Gem in the Forest: 20-Minute Walk to the Springs
itineraries.description: Explore the hidden gem that awaits us within the heart of the forest. Walk 20 minutes to arrive in the springs.

itineraries.title: Experience the Breathtaking Beauty of the Blue Eye
itineraries.description: Enjoy the breathtaking nature wonder of the Blue Eye.

itineraries.title: The Road to Kosovo’s Cultural Capital
itineraries.description:
• Morning Departure: Your journey begins with a pickup from your hotel or preferred location in Tirana, heading north toward the border.
  • Arrival in Prizren: Step into what is often called the "cultural capital of Kosovo," a city rich in Byzantine, Ottoman, and Yugoslav influences.
  • Ottoman Heritage: Wander the iconic cobblestone streets of the Old Town to see the stunning 1615 Sinan Pasha Mosque and cross the 16th-century Old Stone Bridge.
  • The League of Prizren: Visit the historic site where the Albanian League of Prizren was established in 1878, marking a pivotal moment in the movement for Albanian national identity.
  • Religious Landmarks: Explore the UNESCO-listed 14th-century Church of Our Lady of Ljeviš and other significant spiritual sites that represent the city's diverse heritage.
  • Prizren Fortress: Hike up to the medieval castle ruins, also known as Kalaja e Prizrenit, for breathtaking panoramic views of the entire city and the surrounding Sharr Mountains.

itineraries.title: Prishtina: The Dynamic New Capital
itineraries.description:
• Journey to the Capital: After a traditional lunch in Prizren's old town, continue the drive to Prishtina, the vibrant and energetic capital of Europe’s youngest country.
  • Independence Symbols: Visit the world-renowned Newborn Monument, a typographic sculpture that is repainted every year to symbolize Kosovo's progress since its 2008 declaration of independence.
  • Architectural Marvels: Marvel at the National Library of Kosovo, famous for its unique (and sometimes controversial) brutalist design featuring 99 white domes.
  • City Center Stroll: Walk through Mother Teresa Square, the city's main pedestrian artery, and visit the Imperial Mosque (Xhamia e Mbretit), which dates back to 1461.
  • Modern Spirit: Experience the lively atmosphere of Prishtina's cafes and squares, reflecting a city that seamlessly blends centuries of history with a forward-looking, modern identity.
  • Evening Return: Conclude your exploration of Kosovo and begin the scenic return journey back to Tirana.

itineraries.title: Scenic Drive and Sveti Stefan Viewpoint
itineraries.description:
• Northern Journey: Begin your full-day journey with a pickup in Tirana, driving north towards the stunning Adriatic coastline of Montenegro.
  • Sveti Stefan Photo Stop: Pause for a refreshing coffee break and photo opportunity at the viewpoint overlooking Sveti Stefan, one of the most exclusive and picturesque island resorts on the Adriatic.

itineraries.title: Historic Budva and the Old Town
itineraries.description:
• Arrival in Budva: Continue your journey to Budva, a coastal city known for its vibrant atmosphere and rich history.
  • Old Town Exploration: Immerse yourself in the charm of Budva's well-preserved Stari Grad (Old Town), walking through ancient streets.
  • Key Historic Sites: Visit significant landmarks including:
    • Budva Citadel: Explore the fortress offering historical insight and excellent views of the sea and town.
    • Churches and Ruins: See the Church of Sveti Ivan, Santa Maria’s Church, and the remains of Roman Villas.
    • Historical Markers: Visit the grave of the famous writer Stefan Mitrov Ljubiša.
  • Lunch with a View: Enjoy a delightful lunch stop at a restaurant situated on a hillside, offering panoramic views of the city and coastline.

itineraries.title: Kotor: Medieval Walled City and Fortress Climb
itineraries.description:
• Journey to Kotor: A short 30-minute drive leads you to the magnificent Bay of Kotor.
  • Walking Tour: Participate in a walking tour of the majestic, UNESCO-listed Old Town of Kotor, a fortified medieval maze filled with history.
  • Fortress Ascent: Embark on a climb up the ancient city walls to the Fortress of Kotor (San Giovanni Fortress). This demanding but rewarding ascent provides unparalleled, panoramic views of the entire bay—one of the most unique and memorable vistas in all of Europe.
  • Return Journey: Conclude your exploration of Montenegro's coastal treasures and begin the return trip to Tirana.

itineraries.title: Belshi Town Brief Stop
itineraries.description:
• Today your journey commences in Tirana. Start your drive towards the ottoman city of Berat.
  • Midway you will come across the small town of Belsh. Found in the karstic region of Dumrea, Belshi town is located by Belshi lake and surrounded by 84 other small lake. Enjoy a brief stop for a caffe by the lake.

itineraries.title: Berati Castle
itineraries.description: • Next, ascend the castle hill for a visit to the 2,500-year-old Berati Castle. Embark on a 1.5-hour walking tour and learn about its development under different empires, spanning from Roman to Byzantine to Ottoman. Visit several landmarks, including the Church of Saint Mary, the Church of the Holy Trinity, the Red Mosque, the fortress walls and watchtowers, and traditional Ottoman houses.

itineraries.title: Mangalemi and Gorica Old Towns
itineraries.description:
• Descend to the city center and explore the renowned Mangalemi neighborhood. Discover significant landmarks such as the city gate and former Pasha's residence, the Sultan's Mosque, and Berat's bustling boulevard. Pass by the famous Gorica Bridge and explore the old Gorica neighborhood.

  • Enjoy free time to wander around the old towns and stop for lunch.

itineraries.title: Start of the day
itineraries.description: • Pick-ups are arranged anytime from 09:00 to 10:00 at or very close to your hotel. The tour guide will greet you and you will be welcomed by a comfortable transportation vehicle.

itineraries.title: Bovilla Canyon
itineraries.description: • As you journey thought the countryside of Albania, you will reach the Bovilla Canyons. Enjoy the beautiful nature views of the canyon. Take a short break for some pictures and a bit of strech.

itineraries.title: Bovilla Dam
itineraries.description: • Drive up Bovilla Dam, an impressive structure towering at a height of 91 meters. This dam serves as the primary source for Tirana's electricity and water supply, drawing from the surrounding lake.

itineraries.title: Gamti Mountain
itineraries.description: • Embark on the hiking trail towards Gamti Mountain, where every turn reveals stunning views of the lake and the surrounding countryside. The hike includes intermittent breaks to rest and absorb the scenery. After approximately 25 minutes at an elevation of 850 meters the road ends and you will reach the only cafe in Gamti mountain. After this there is an additional 10-minute hike up the rocky slopes to reach the summit. Upon reaching the summit, you will encounter one of the most amazing views in Albania. Descend along the same path and, upon reaching the base, visit the river's shore.

itineraries.title: Free Time
itineraries.description: • End your day with some free time to enjoy a meal at a nearby restaurant or a snack you’ve brought along. After a day filled with adventure and stunning natural scenery, return to Tirana, where you’ll be dropped off at your accommodation.

itineraries.title: Rozafa Castle
itineraries.description: • Begin with a pickup from your accommodation in Tirana and head to Shkodra City, the cultural capital of North Albania.First, visit the Castle of Rozafa, where the 2,000-year-old history of the city is hidden in the walls. Wander through ancient stone walls where Illyrians, Romans, Venetians, and Ottomans once stood. Be captivated by the legend of Rozafa, a tale of sacrifice and strength that still echoes through the castle's stones. Take in panoramic vistas of Lake Shkodra, the Drin and Buna rivers, and the Albanian Alps beyond.

itineraries.title: Gjuhadal, Shkodra City Center
itineraries.description: • Next, head to the center of Shkodra city, Gjuhadol. Step into the soul of Shkodër, once home to diplomats and poets. Today, Gjuhadol is the city’s cultural heart, a lively pedestrian zone lined with cozy guesthouses, jazz bars, flower stalls, and artisan shops. Enjoy 1 hour of free time to wander on your own and explore the charming and artistic center.

itineraries.title: Mesi Bridge
itineraries.description: • After your free time in Shkoder, take a short drive to visit one of the most iconic bridges of Albania, Mesi Bridge. This Ottoman bridge has stood for 250 years and is renowned for its architecture, featuring 13 stone arches. It remains one of the best-preserved Ottoman bridges in Albania.

itineraries.title: Shkodra Lake, Shiroke
itineraries.description: • Finally, enjoy a traditional lunch at a cozy restaurant by Lake Shkodra before heading back to Tirana.

reviews.name: Eva98
reviews.title: Fantastic scenery
reviews.comment:
What a great trip! I could not imagine the beauty of the Albanian alps, theth, blue eye and Shkodra.
The car we travelled was very comfy. The guide very much informed, engaging and friendly. Loved everything in this trip.
Thank you Albania Inbound

reviews.name: Terrel W
reviews.title: Perfect day trip exciting and action packed saw and learned a lot Albania is a wonderful place to visit
reviews.comment: I had an incredible one day tour with Henri, great guide, incredible knowledge and very flexible to my needs I am rebooking another trip for 3 days as I enjoy my trip so much, was perfect for a solo traveler great comfortable vehicle as well fully recommend a Henri tour

reviews.name: Elda C
reviews.title: Trip with breathtaking views
reviews.comment: Very thankful of Albanian Travel and Tours and our guide Henry for their invaluable support in creating a customised itinerary that perfectly suited our preferences. Our day in Theth was wonderful. We hiked to the blue Eye and to Grunas Waterfall. The nature in Theth is breathtaking, so quiet peaceful and clean. Highly recommendable for a family trip.

reviews.name: Harel S
reviews.title: Fantastic tour, nature and guide!
reviews.comment:
Every hour of our day tour felt like it was spent to the max with Henry - from our morning pick-up right on time in Tirana, to the time spent in each stop along the way, I'd warmly recommend this tour.
Travelling in Albania right on the verge of spring, we had the opportunity to explore a less accessible region of the country with the otherwise challenging navigation and guidance bring taken care of to our utmost satisfaction.
We were able to get a peak to what has long been an isolated region of Northern Albania, thoroughly enjoyed the hikes, the beautiful nature (both greenery and snow) and the flexibility of our guide, Henry.
He justifies a few extra words, because this is a guide who truly feels like a companion and a friend - with excellent English, high degree of consideration and impressive amounts of energy - he was totally into providing us with the best experience possible, while talking about history, philosophy and life.
I highly recommend this tour to anyone interested in Northern Albania with a local perspective!

reviews.name: Anna B
reviews.title: I would give a 10 star for our guide Henri.I hope i’ll see him again when we go back to Tirana
reviews.comment: We were a group of 4 and we were Guided by Henri .I would definitely give him a 10 star.He is been very helpful and very friendly man.Henri even bought breakfast for us and He is a good photographer too,clicked loads of nice pics for us.You will never feel bored and trip was worth for the views we had.I would definitely recommend this trip and especially Henri if you are looking for an amazing trip to Theth.

reviews.name: Amanda B
reviews.title: Incredible trip
reviews.comment: I had a wonderful day with my guide Nolan visiting Theth. The drive was incredible - breathtaking scenery - and the hike to the Blue Eye of Theth was a lot of fun, and so beautiful. Nolan shared a lot of info about the areas we visited, and was really helpful in chatting with the restaurant staff about vegan options - which is tricky in this part of Albania. I highly recommend this trip, and Nolan and Albanian Travel and Tours. I will travel with them again the next time I’m in Albania.

reviews.name: J P
reviews.title: Beautiful Theth!!!
reviews.comment:
Theth was the highlight of our trip to Albania.. Definitely recommend a day trip!! We stared the day at the Church of Theth, followed by the Reconciliation tower.. Grunas waterfall was beautiful... Later the hike to the blue eye was the highlight..

I must say we were definitely slow and the hike did take a lil longer but Henri was really patient with us :D The mountain view was absolutely stunning.. The drive was scenic and even though it was a long drive, the journey was comfortable... Thanks Henri! We had the best time...

reviews.name: Ellis C
reviews.title: Absoultely Incredible Trip! - 1000% Recommend
reviews.comment:
This was the absolute highlight of our trip to Albania. We had so much fun, and the views on the drive to Theth were just incredible. The hike was pretty easy, even if you’re not super experienced. There was a bit of a climb, but it wasn’t too hard—I did it in my Nikes (not the best idea, but you get the point). Totally worth it though! Plus, lunch was delicious!

We were a group of four, and Henri was our guide. He was amazing! So funny, knowledgeable, and full of energy. I booked this tour for my girlfriend's birthday, and Henri made it super special by surprising her with a cake at the top of the most stunning viewpoint!

My girlfriend keeps saying it was her best birthday ever, and I owe it all to Henri and this amazing tour. It was outstanding and created memories that will last a lifetime.

reviews.name: Yannis K
reviews.title: Amazing tour in the Albanian Alps and Theth!
reviews.comment:
Hello...My name is Yannis from Athens, Greece and on Sunday June 2nd 2024 I did the Albanian Alps and Theth tour with the agency Albanian travel and tours.
It was a beautiful tour that I highly recommend! The landscape was beautiful and the mountains, the village of Theth ,the forests ,the hikings leading to beautiful waterfalls and lakes were all amazing,as if I were to Switzerland or Austria..
It was only me and a girl from UK,so not a big group..Our guide Nolan was very friendly, passionate,was speaking English very well and he was also very careful while driving!
I guarantee you will enjoy this tour for sure!

reviews.name: Flavio
reviews.title: A good day!
reviews.comment: The trip was amazing, Theth and the Alps around are a real wonder. Enjoyed the time a lot, Marjan was a very good guide who explained a lot about the history of Theth. Nice experience, recommended!

reviews.name: Christina B
reviews.title: Amazing trip to the Albanian Alps and Blue Eye ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆
reviews.comment:
This was such an impressive experience! The hike through the Albanian Alps was absolutely beautiful, and the swim in the Blue Eye was unforgettable – the water is only 5°C, icy cold but incredibly refreshing after the climb.

Our guide Daniel and the driver were truly excellent – knowledgeable, professional, and very kind. Unfortunately, our bus broke down on the way back. These things can happen, but it took quite a while before replacement transport arrived. Daniel really proved to be a pro in handling the situation calmly and keeping everyone informed.

Tips for future travelers:
• Wear proper shoes – this hike is definitely not for flip-flops.
• Bring enough drinking water for the climb.

All in all, a wonderful adventure worth recommending!

reviews.name: Jessi R
reviews.title: Not for faint of heart but so worth it
reviews.comment: Daniel our guide was impressive. The hike it's self is not easy but worth it! Unfortunately rained a bit so the "trail" was slippery. Not for someone looking for a casual stroll or has knee/foot problems. Dress accordingly! (Hikers or runners for sure, athletic pants, layers)

reviews.name: Aimee C
reviews.title: Fantastic and Well Organised Tour
reviews.comment:
We were really keen to visit the Albanian alps while in Tirana for 5 days , but couldn't decide on a when to fit it in. We booked this tour while in the city the morning before and i'm so glad we did. Our guide Nolan and his driver picked us up at 5.45, 30 seconds from our AirBnB and we had a full group of 19. There were frequent photo stops on the drive up before reaching the stunningly beautiful Theth village and heading up for the hike to the blue eye. I'm so glad we didn't attempt to drive this ourselves! The driver handled the mountain roads really well and we felt completely safe. Nolan speaks excellent English and gave us lots of info on Albanian culture and history on the drive up. On the hike, he encouraged people to work to their own abilities and stayed at the back of the group to ensure everyone was taken care of.
A few pieces of information that are useful to know - the hike is moderate; not easy, not hard (in the summer months at least. I imagine it's on the easier end of the scale at other times if year). Decent shoes, trainers, or boots are recommended. The water is icy cold, it will take your breath away! The day will last some 15 hours from Tirana in a large group; we returned c.9pm. Useful to have some snacks or breakfast with you due to the early start & to fuel the hike before lunch. And finally, the landscape is stunningly beautiful.
A great day with a diverse and interesting group and a great energetic guide: its great value and a wonderful day.

reviews.name: Stephie
reviews.title: Highly recommended Theth tour
reviews.comment: I had an amazing tour with Henri to Theth! Despite terrible weather in the morning Henri was able to modify our plans until the weather was better and we were able to hike. The company provided good rain jackets that kept up dry and warm. Theth Village and the Blue Eye hike were stunning. I loved my time here. The drive is long but the views along the way are great. A true slice of heaven in Albania.

reviews.name: Tuhina
reviews.title: Everything was just perfect
reviews.comment: I’d like to begin by expressing a heartfelt thank you to Henri for organizing such a beautiful trip. He was truly exceptional — we enjoyed every moment of the journey. Everything was seamless and thoughtfully planned. Henri is a star! He shared the history of Albania in such an engaging way. I would absolutely recommend this tour to anyone who loves hiking and nature. We had the chance to witness the highest point in Albania. The trek through the rugged mountains was breathtaking, and reaching the Blue Eye of Theth made it all the more worthwhile. The river was calm, the views were incredibly peaceful, and the entire experience felt rejuvenating. After our hike, we enjoyed a delicious lunch by the lakeside — the perfect way to wrap up the adventure. In short, everything was just perfect.

reviews.name: Juhi
reviews.title: Perfect hiking experience in Theth
reviews.comment: Henri, our guide was amazing and he made sure everyone is following through the hiking trail. The trip was well organized, travel was great and we made stops on the way with enchanting views of the Albanian Alps before heading to the final destination Blue Eye. It was an incredible tour and Henri also shared historical facts about the Theth village which is appreciated. We were given enough time to explore and enjoy the trip. Definitely recommend. Thanks Henri!

reviews.name: Adela
reviews.title: Learned and explored so much
reviews.comment: This was an amazing trip. The scenery was beautiful, we had a wonderful time exploring the landscape and hiking while enjoying the crisp clean air and witnessing different animals in nature. We also learned some interesting facts about the history of Theth. Thank you to our guides Nolan and Tedi for providing amazing service. They were very patient, helpful, and overall a great vibe throughout the trip! I would highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Clare
reviews.title: A wonderful way to see Albania
reviews.comment: Great day out! The trip had a great pace with built in stops along the way and well organised, and the hike itself was brilliant, beautiful scenery and amazing to see a different side of Albania and get to immerse in nature! Nolan was a friendly and thoughtful guide, looking after the whole group, regularly checking in on everyone while also allowing independence and for people to enjoy things at their own pace. The views along route were amazing and the driver did a great job driving carefully on such tricky roads. Many thanks for a lovely day!

reviews.name: Mikhail
reviews.title: Good organization and flexibility
reviews.comment: I really enjoyed the tour with Nolan. We had a comfortable car and a good driver. There were six tourists in total, and the pace was very relaxed — we never felt rushed when visiting the Blue Eye and the church in Theth. After the hike, we had the opportunity to have lunch. I ordered veal, but unfortunately, I didn’t like it — it was dry and tough. However, the guide doesn’t pressure anyone to order food; some tourists brought their own snacks.

reviews.name: Thanh Thi
reviews.title: Enjoyable trip despite changing weather
reviews.comment: We booked day trip to Theth village and Blue eyes lake. It’s a small private group with only 4 tourists. Our tour guide Mentor is friendly, helpful and enthusiastic, although the weather is challenging (sunny, rainy, hailing) but he managed to show us as much as possible, we really enjoyed and appreciated it, thank you Mentor and our company couple ❤️ P.s just one small thing that picking up time needs to be updated along with pick up destination, for example I booked tour from Shokder (pick up at 8.30-9am) not 6.30am (from Tirana).

reviews.name: Soraya
reviews.title: A must-do tour in Albania
reviews.comment: First of all, WOW! Daniel made us feel right at home and safe! He helped with difficult parts of the hike, gave historical information regarding the village and Albania in general and made sure everything went smoothly along the way. Albania is so beautiful and he made sure we saw all the good spots. If you are thinking of booking a tour in Albania, book this one!! I am sad the day is over as I can not get enough of the beautiful Albanian Apls. The hike itself was pretty difficult at some parts, please be critical about yourself if you can handle it. The information on this tour will help you with that.

reviews.name: Alejandro Ibanez
reviews.title: Great time and amazing sights
reviews.comment: I had a great time, I really enjoyed it, the guide was very nice and the places we saw were incredible, I learned a lot

reviews.name: Max
reviews.title: Highly recommended for nature lovers
reviews.comment: I was not a really nature person, however after seeing pictures of Theth, especially the church, I said I must come here and I found this tour. And I don’t regret my decision. The tour started very early, about 1 hour earlier to avoid the infamous Tirane traffic jam but the communication from the tour group was excellent. My tour guide was Desi and he is one of the highlight of the tour. This is a young man but with great stamina, excellent communication skill and also very knowledgable about the place. The driving was expectedly long but the bus was comfortable. Once reaching, we did the trek to Blue Eye which is a challenging for a person like me, however with the help of Desi, I managed to reach the place and also have the courage to dip in the freezing water. After the tour, the lunch was so fulfilling but the history of the village including the isolation tower where Desi really show his knowledge and the view from the Church is absolutely out-of-this-world. This is a must-do tour

reviews.name: Shree Shravani
reviews.title: Genand made it unforgettable
reviews.comment: Our tour from Tirana to Theth was absolutely amazing! Our guide, Genand, was friendly, funny, and very patient, especially with us beginner hikers. He gave us plenty of time to enjoy the hike and take in the stunning scenery. The Blue Eye of Theth was breathtaking, truly a must-see! I highly recommend this trip and Genand as a guide. It was the perfect mix of adventure, nature, and great company!

reviews.name: Amy Stenes
reviews.title: Perfect day exploring Theth
reviews.comment: We did the tour to Theth and Blue Eye from Tirana. The mountains were beautiful and worth the visit. The van was comfortable and well driven. The road is now paved all the way which was nice. It isn't very wide though! Our guide lead us to the Blue Eye and organized our lunch.

reviews.name: Lisa
reviews.title: Breathtaking scenery and an amazing guide
reviews.comment: I had an incredible experience on this tour! Our guide, Daniel, was absolutely superb, knowledgeable, full of energy, and honestly one of the best guides I’ve ever had in all my years of solo traveling. The scenery on the Theth hike, blue eye, and Albanian Alps was breathtaking, far beyond what I expected. The journey itself also felt just as enjoyable as the destinations. A special mention also goes to our driver, who was amazing and made me feel completely safe. I would highly recommend this tour to anyone visiting the area, it’s an unforgettable experience!

reviews.name: Muhammad
reviews.title: One of the best tours in Albania
reviews.comment: We had the most incredible trip with Daniel. He is a very knowledgeable and personable guide. He shared lots of interesting facts about Albania, and village traditions, with us and took a genuine interest in the group. The driver was also very skilled in manoeuvring the mountain roads and made us feel safe. The journey itself is stunning, I highly recommend going in Autumn, it feels so magical to drive through the mountains with the trees turning orange, red and yellow. The hike isn't too strenuous, and you are rewarded with views the whole way. This has to be one of the best tours I've done, not one to be missed when in Albania. Faleminderit!

reviews.name: Kumari
reviews.title: A truly special tour
reviews.comment: We enjoyed the Guide Anest, he was a best guide we had in this tour Albania for last one week, he was very friendly and helpful made our trip very special. He was.a very good human being

reviews.name: Lucie
reviews.title: Best guide and great vibes
reviews.comment: Amazing! Henri was the best guide we could have asked for and made the trip super fun for us :) extremely knowledgable with lots of fun facts! Scenery was beautiful and the whole day was just a great vibe!

reviews.name: Gaston
reviews.title: Amazing experience
reviews.comment: It was really delightful. Nolan did an amazing job keeping up the good vibes throughout the whole trip.

reviews.name: Michelle
reviews.title: An unforgettable Blue Eye & Theth experience
reviews.comment: This was such an amazing tour!! Our guide/driver Anest was the best! It was a small group of 5, including our guide, which made for such a great trip! We were able to stop for coffee along the way, had lunch before we hiked to the Blue Eye, swam, stopped for pictures, and ended our tour at Theth admiring the church and learning about local customs. The hike wasn’t too difficult, and the swim while cold, was so refreshing and delightful. Our group had such a great day together, the only downside was the traffic. What should have taken 1 1/2 hours to get to Shkodër took us 4 1/2, and that was even with our guide looking for alternative routes to miss the bulk of the traffic jam. We left from Tirana at 6:30 and got back at 23:30, so be prepared for a long day of travel in the summer months, because the traffic can get really bad. Anest really went above and beyond as our guide and doing his best to make our tour the fun and enjoyable, despite the unexpected traffic delays and long day!

reviews.name: Vitória Maria
reviews.title: Unforgettable tour thanks to Nolan
reviews.comment: My trip to the Albanian Alpes and Theth was simply amazing, and i want to point out that our Guide ( named Nolan ) was the most kind and patient person, we had two problems: one was that my friend was feeling sick due to the obstacles in the road and he gave her his seat in the front part of the van so she would feel better and she felt so. The second one was with our car when we came back from the tour, and he didn’t leave us alone until we were safe, we want to thank him because he was top 10

reviews.name: Ayman Hussein El
reviews.title: Amazing tour with Henri
reviews.comment: Henri is exceptional, very friendly and helpful, i enjoyed the tour with him and if i can choose all tours with him, i would do so. Thank you Henri for everything.

reviews.name: Romelyn
reviews.title: Worth the hike for the views
reviews.comment: We had a really a great time in this tour! And Nolan was amazing! He was really kind, nice to talk to, giving us tips around Albania and was knowledgeable with Albania’s history. The hike was long but it was all worth it once you see the scenery. The Alps and the Blue Eye was very beautiful! The food for our lunch was very delicious too. Overall the tour was excellent and we truly enjoyed!😊❤️

reviews.name: Thiruvilan Arakkonam
reviews.title: Wonderful experience with great food
reviews.comment: The tour guide spoke excellent English and gave detailed explanations about the historical sites. He was considerate, adaptable, helpful, and caring. His driving was smooth, and he made frequent stops for great photo opportunities. He also introduced us to local Albanian snacks and cuisine. The history of Theth village was particularly unique, and the spectacular Blue Eye was indescribably beautiful. Happy customer 😊

reviews.name: Nadira K
reviews.title: Wonderful day in the Albanian Alps
reviews.comment: This tour was an amazing way to discover the beauty of Theth. The scenery was breathtaking, and everything was well organized from start to finish. Our guide, Nolan, made the experience even more special with his knowledge and friendliness. If you’re in Tirana and want an unforgettable day in nature, this trip is a must!

reviews.name: Gabriella L
reviews.title: A great tour and overall experience!
reviews.comment: So glad I did this tour! It was such a fun day, packed with beautiful scenery and visiting the Blue Eye was well worth the hike. Nolan and our driver were super helpful, even from before we got on the bus and really went above and beyond. Would recommend!!

reviews.name: Zahra Patterson
reviews.title: Highly recommend this trip
reviews.comment: Albanian alps were stunning! Had an excellent day visiting the blue eye of Theth and theth village. There is lots of driving on this trip but worth it to see the views. Indrit the tour guide was lovely and really friendly. I would recommend this trip

reviews.name: Rodney S
reviews.title: A full, awesome day of nature and culture!
reviews.comment:
This tour featured incredible views, historical landmarks and hiking through some of the most beautiful wilderness l've ever
encountered, but what really set it apart was our guide, Marjan’s personal connection to the area and the people. We had so much fun and adventure! This is a great way to get to know the compelling splendor of Albania. We felt taken care of at every step. I have been on some really fantastic tours. This one was right there near the top. I would highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Bart d
reviews.title: Really nice experience
reviews.comment: We highly recommend this tour to anyone looking to explore the stunning landscapes of Theth and the Albanian Alps. With Nolan as your guide, you’re in for an unforgettable adventure.

reviews.name: Christopher F
reviews.title: Great Hike and day out.
reviews.comment: We had a great trip - our guide was very informative and helpful. The weather was dreadful after arriving but we made the most of it and the guide was very good with assisting us on the hike. Great day out with some amazing sights. Would recommend the company and use them again.

reviews.name: Beccy A
reviews.title: What an incredible day
reviews.comment: What an amazing day! We experienced all four seasons in one day, had an adventure driving through the snowy mountain roads, some insightful history in Theth and the perfect hike to the Blue Eye before a lovely lunch. Huge thanks to my guide, Nolan, who was kind, considerate and lovely to chat to. He was an absolute hero taking the difficult moments of our drive completely in his stride and putting me at ease. Thank you SO much! It's definitely worth the journey from Tirana and the views of the Shkoder lake on the way back were also perfect. What an incredible day!

reviews.name: Bharat Rajaram
reviews.title: Perfect autumn experience
reviews.comment: Fantastic tour to Theth National Park with Albanian Tours and Travels. Henri was a great guide and we had a very enjoyable day with great conversations, great lunch provided as part of the tour and an amazing hike to the Blue Eye in Theth. Theth is an incredible location with beautiful Fall colors during Oct! Highly recommend this trip with Albanian Travels and Tours and especially with Henri

reviews.name: Elisa Poltronieri
reviews.title: Long day but totally worth it
reviews.comment:
I booked a day tour from Tirana to Theth National Park with them and had a fantastic time! Guides Henri and Nolan supported and guided us from start to finish, and they held firm until late in the evening. The tour is very long, starting at 6:30 AM (depending on the starting point) and ending around 9/10 PM, so it should be considered a full day. The trip goes by quickly because the park's beauty can be admired even from the van, and there are two excursions to see a beautiful waterfall and the renowned Blue Eye. Amazing! The lunch was also plentiful and delicious, with even vegan options. I recommend this agency to everyone, as their WhatsApp response times are incredibly fast!!! Thanks again for everything!
P.S.: The only thing I would like to point out is that water and coffee are not included and must be paid for separately.

reviews.name: Tom Dissel
reviews.title: Anest made the tour amazing
reviews.comment:
On Friday, August 15th, we enjoyed a fantastic trip to Blue Eye and Theth. Kudos to our guide, Anest. He guided us through the day at the right pace and with great enthusiasm. We received inspiring stories and lots of tips (including for our next holiday in Albania).
Thanks, Anest, it was wonderful to have you as a guide 👍😃

reviews.name: Àlex Martínez
reviews.title: Excellent experience from start to finish
reviews.comment:
Anest was our guide and driver, and we loved it!
I'd like to take this opportunity, Anest, to thank you again for your attention, friendliness, and for all the hours of driving you had to do so we could enjoy the excursion.

We had a fantastic excursion to the Blue Eye and the village of Theth. The scenery, the views, and the short walk through the Albanian Alps were beautiful and interesting. Anest also took great care of us throughout the excursion and shared all the stories, anecdotes, and interesting facts she knew.

Finally, we went to eat at a restaurant serving traditional homemade food, which was really good! In our case, we think it's worth booking the Civitatis excursion that includes a lunch menu. (If not, you can still go to the restaurant with the whole group and order whatever dishes you'd like.)

reviews.name: Liz H
reviews.title: Great tour
reviews.comment:
I had a positive experience and enjoyed this tour.
It is a long day but that's to be expected with the distance travelling and the types of road and terrain.
I had excellent communication with the team when booking the tour and they answered my questions and gave me key information.
The guide was supportive and gave some information about the places we visited but it would have been nice for him to tell us more.
There was no rushing and I never felt pressured to go quickly at all. The food at the lunch spot was excellent and they catered for vegetarians well.

reviews.name: Donna F
reviews.title: Theth Tour
reviews.comment: Nolan was super sweet on the tour! Theth is beautiful and definitely the best highlight in Albania. Highly recommend this tour! It’s a long day but worth it. Thank you.

reviews.name: EmilyN
reviews.title: A long day but a good day
reviews.comment: Pick ups were smooth - I was well communicated with via whatsapp leading up to collection. Prepare for a long day (14hrs total). After 1.5hr a short stop. Opportunities to stop for photos at viewpoints as you go through the Alps. The hike was great - there is a 15min uphill section, and it is on loose rocks which can be slippery. The Blue Eye was stunning, for sure go up over the suspension bridge. Lunch after the walk at the restaurant was fine, there was plenty of food. The visit to Theti was short and just looking at the church and the reconciliation tower. Overall a great trip and beautiful day in the alps - thanks Henri

reviews.name: nancywanderer
reviews.title: Stunning National Park!
reviews.comment: Theth is beautiful! A must-see in Albania. The guide was accommodating and the pick-up was on schedule. I would encourage the tour guide to provide more information about the country and the national park.

reviews.name: NikhilC
reviews.title: Great experience. Highlight of Albania
reviews.comment: This tour was amazing. I did this in autumn time and I have to say this was truly breathtaking. Yes it's a little far and yes it's more expensive than the other tours, but this was easily the best experience I had in Albania. I would highly recommend this especially if you have a clear day the views are truly out of this world

reviews.name: Necia
reviews.title: Amazing!!!
reviews.comment: This was an AMAZING tour!  Our guide, Daniel, was the BEST!  He was very knowledgeable and gave us a lot of information!  It included a hike to the Blue Eye and, sadly, I did not have the stamina to make it all the way there. Daniel sent me pictures of it and they will be going on my wall!  The drive to the trail head and the village of Theth were phenomenal!  The absolute beauty took my breath away and completely stole my heart!  I would very highly recommend this tour!  THANK YOU, DANIEL, for making this an amazing experience and for being so wonderful!  Your kindness will not be forgotten and is so very much appreciated!

reviews.name: AlistairR
reviews.title: Beautiful sights on a well organised tour
reviews.comment: A really fantastic and well organised experience. The sights and views were incredible and the tour as a whole was very well organised with a friendly tour guide. A highlight of visiting Albania!

reviews.name: GabrielP
reviews.title: This was a fantastic day...
reviews.comment: This was a fantastic day trip from Tirana. Our guide, Mentor, was terrific, providing insightful background about the country and the sites we were seeing. He stopped along the journey for scenic lookouts, guided us on the hike to the beautiful Blue Eye waterfall, and took us to historic places in the area. Plus he navigated the mountain roads like a champ. You can cover a lot of ground on this excursion and literally immerse yourself in the northern part of the country (including a dip in the water at the Blue Eye). I highly recommend it!

reviews.name: KristinH
reviews.title: Great
reviews.comment: It was a small and private tour and Heral did his best to give us a unique experience. He gave us hiking sticks (super helpful) and we had good conversations. Thank you

reviews.name: HsiuchihC
reviews.title: One of the best spot in Albania
reviews.comment:
The view was fantastic. You will feel all the early wake up and tired hiking worth it when you reach the Blue Eye.
Our tour guide, Henri was very helpful. One of group lost his purse and passport. Fortunately, he helped him get it back!

reviews.name: TanyaK
reviews.title: 5/5 would recommend visiting Albanian Alps for a hike!
reviews.comment: Great day tour, my guide was Nolan who ensured the day was comfortable, we hiked to great spots to see the Blue eye pools, and also he helped me take a million photos as I was traveling solo. got lots of good information about Albania and Theth (he answered all my  questions with information about the areas). Would recommend a visit here as it was beautiful to be hiking in the Albanian Alps! Hike is a moderate grade 3 hike, so with reasonable fitness levels should be done easily! :)

reviews.name: JamesE
reviews.title: This was an incredible...
reviews.comment: This was an incredible tour. Theth is breathtaking. Henri was a great tour guide. He knew so much about the region and the culture.

reviews.name: MathureA
reviews.title: AMAZING THETH
reviews.comment: Henri was an amazing tour guide, he was very interactive & showed us around great! He also made us feel really safe as the roads there aren’t the greatest. Would recommend booking this excursion. Definitely worth seeing theth in Albania!!

reviews.name: ArturoR
reviews.title: Beautiful day & scenic ride
reviews.comment: Landscapes were out of this world in October. Rain and clouds didn’t break our trip, but I can imagine we would not enjoy it that much if we had heavy rain as the hike is rocky and steep (no complain, worth it!) Our driver Noli was a very good driver and fun to hang out with during the day. The lunch was very good. We had vegetable omelette, chicken and veal meat, vegetable salad, chips, olives with yogurt and bread. All delicious. We felt a bit rushed during the hike, but we understood it was to squeeze all that is planned into our itinerary. The church of Teth is just a short photo stop, we thought there is more to see, bit our bad. Overall, a great day!!

reviews.name: AntheaO
reviews.title: Exceptional tour
reviews.comment:
This was an incredible tour. We had a little bit of a rocky start time due to unforeseen circumstances, but this was insignificant by the end of the day. Our tour guide Henri was the most thoughtful, attentive and knowledgeable guide I have ever had. He got to know everyone on the bus and was constantly checking in to see that we were all comfortable. We learnt so much about Albanian history and culture, whilst taking in truly breathtaking landscapes. We enjoyed the scenic stop off points and most of all, the hike up the mountains and the clear blue waters. The blue eye is as beautiful as the pictures. Henri then took us around Theth village which was a picturesque and interesting site.
It was great to be able to fit some of Albania’s hidden gems into one day. Thank you Henri for such a great experience.

reviews.name: Laila
reviews.title: An awesome day trip
reviews.comment: The trip itself was awesome but our guide Daniel made it even better; he taught us so many things along the way and always kept the vibe up. 100% recommend !!

reviews.name: Brenda
reviews.title: Loved every moment
reviews.comment: It was wonderful, me and my friends loved everything. Also, Desi is a very nice guide, very inteligent as well and it was nice to get to know more about the viallage thought out his perception and knowledge of it

reviews.name: Yusuf
reviews.title: Highlight of My Trip to Albania
reviews.comment: I had the best time on the Albanian Alps and Theth Village Day Tour! Daniel, our guide, is a true northern Albanian and his passion for guiding really shows. He was super fun, knowledgeable, and made the whole experience unforgettable. Theth is already stunning, but Daniel’s energy and stories brought it to life — hands down the best tour I’ve done in Albania!

reviews.name: Rachel
reviews.title: A Tour to Remember
reviews.comment: Desi was amazing! Such a beautiful tour, highly recommend!

reviews.name: Nikolas
reviews.title: Fantastic guide and driver
reviews.comment: Daniel was an amazing tour guide for our trip through Theth and the Albanian Alps! He went above and beyond to make sure we had everything we needed and made the entire journey smooth and enjoyable. We had an amazing driver who kept us safe and comfortable the whole way. Couldn’t have asked for a better experience highly recommend.

reviews.name: Amelia
reviews.title: A great day on tour
reviews.comment: We had a great time on the tour. Our guide Desi was a highlight, such a great guide that had us laughing and learning all day.

reviews.name: Bartłomiej
reviews.title: Incredible views in Albania
reviews.comment: Very good tour in the beautiful nature of Albania. Although it takes a whole day from the early morning you doesn’t want it to be over. Both Theth and Blue Eye well worth visiting. Nice landscapes during the ride

reviews.name: Juliane
reviews.title: Memorable adventure
reviews.comment: Really nice locations, worth seeing them all! Be prepared for a hike at almost 40 degrees, you will go for 50 minutes one way and back, going up a hill. Can be a bit exhausting if you are not used to high temperatures but really worth seeing it! Thanks also to Nolan for beeing such a good guide, very kind and supportive 😉

reviews.name: Alexandra
reviews.title: Enjoyable day in the Albanian Alps
reviews.comment: It was a blast! We had Nolan as our guide who was lovely. The drive to Theth was beautiful and fun - just looking out the window was great. The hike was pretty quick and not too hard. It was nice to be in a relatively small group who all fit into a sprinter van. Overall, would definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Yakuzza
reviews.title: One of the best trips in Albania
reviews.comment: It was very nice the car was nice, and the tour guide Henri was the best tour guide that I ever had, thanks to him it was nicer. I advice everyone to do this trip. One of the best trip in albania.

reviews.name: Vanessa
reviews.title: Amazing support and great day
reviews.comment: I had fun.. The hike was very challenging for me because of medical reasons but our tour guide, Nolan was so patient with me, taking breaks during the hike, encouraging me to walk al the way.. which I appreciated so much. He is super awesome.. It was such a memorable day. Thank you..

reviews.name: Marco Antonio Chavez
reviews.title: A day to remember
reviews.comment: it was a totally great experience. I enjoyed the day very much

reviews.name: Ravneet
reviews.title: Challenging hike, worth it
reviews.comment: Had a fantastic day in Albanian Alps. Henri, our guide was lovely. Picked us up from our hotel location and also dropped us timely. He guided us through the trek route and the views were so scenic and amazing. Trek could be challenging through Rocky Mountain paths, so please wear good hiking shoes. Also got complementary lunch. Highly recommended to anybody visiting Albania.

reviews.name: Ina
reviews.title: Perfect for beginner hikers
reviews.comment: Henri was very attentive and a great guide! It started raining a bit on the hike but Henri made sure we were all doing ok! If you are worried about the difficulty of the hike (I know I was) and you don’t have much hiking experience, don’t worry it’s most definitely doable and you’re in good hands! It does have some rocky parts but nothing crazy at all

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.title: Perfect guide for the Albanian Alps
reviews.comment: Henri was the perfect guide for our adventure to the Albanian Alps and Theth. Friendly, polite, and genuinely funny, he kept us entertained and engaged from pick-up to drop-off. On the hike, Henri struck a great balance between letting us enjoy the peaceful scenery and chatting in an engaging, insightful way. His knowledge of Northern Albania’s history and culture was impressive and clearly the result of deep passion and time spent learning. Despite the long day, we enjoyed every moment and felt fully immersed in the beauty and stories of the region. Highly recommend

reviews.name: Sheng
reviews.title: Beautiful hike
reviews.comment: Tour - It’s a 12 hour day from pick up to drop off but totally worth it. 3.5 - 4/10 difficulty rating for the hike to the Blue Eye, so pretty easy, depending on your fitness level. There are a lot of rocks on the hike so wear appropriate shoes. The hike was stunning and the stop at Theth was absolutely magical. Theth looks like it’s straight out of a fantasy novel. Tour Guide - Nolan was the best! Excellent driver (good enough to be a Formula 1 driver!) and an amazing tour guide. Nolan was a lot of fun and very knowledgeable! He was also very flexible so don’t be afraid to ask him if you need something. He also speaks excellent English! Would do more tours with him in a heart beat. Thanks for a wonderful time, Nolan!

reviews.name: Manu
reviews.title: Well-handled and unforgettable experience
reviews.comment: It was perfect. The Albanian Alps and the area are beyond beautiful. The route is 4/10 in terms of difficulty (if you are used to do hiking or exercise) but after a week of heavy rain some surfaces could be slippery and muddy so I highly recommend hiking boots and not vans or even sandals. Henri, the tour guide, was amazing and he explained to us a lot of Theth’s history. We even had a serious incident coming back to Tirana and he handled it very professionally. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: David
reviews.title: Highly recommended day tour
reviews.comment: The tour picked us up from our hotel in Shkoder. There were only 5 people in total on our tour, but the car was a bit cramped with us all. We stopped off first at Qafë Thore for a stunning view, then headed up and down the mountains to the Blue Eye for a fairly strenuous hike. The Blue Eye was beautiful and worth the 45 minute hike each way. We then had a very basic lunch there at a restaurant, before continuing on to Theth, where we stopped to see the church for 2 minutes before it began pouring and we headed back to Shkoder through the mountains. This was a great day, and although very long with a lot of time spent in the car, our guide Nolan was very helpful and spoke good English. We loved the Blue Eye and the views.
