The information is slightly misleading as the tour does not stop at the Grunas waterfall or the natural springs in the mountains. Otherwise a great day and would highly recommend

reviews.name: Anthony
reviews.title: Henri made it unforgettable
reviews.comment: The trip was long and tiring but kudos to our great driver / tour guide Henri … really amazing guy super easily to talk to and always ready to help. Very sociable and informative. He makes everyone in the group feel welcome and comfortable. The lunch provided was sufficient the hike was nice with a lot of natural beauty especially the drive to the village or hiking place. Beware the water in the blue eye is freezing. Definitely an amazing trip. Great job Henri.

reviews.name: Syeda
reviews.title: Amazing day tour, 5/5
reviews.comment: Super funny tourguide Henry! Very cute and nice helpful girl at the bottom at the resturant! Food was good! Carmusic was good! 5/5 If want to see authentic Albanian countryside! The blue eye in theth was magisk❤️

reviews.name: Rishabh
reviews.title: Perfect mix of nature and history
reviews.comment: Henri was an amazing guide, picked me up in the morning from Tirana and on the way to the alps, he interacted with everyone making sure everyone felt comfortable. We had a small 10minutes break in between to get some coffee and sight see a city. And then we had a beautiful scenic drive up the Albanian alps where we made some stops to click some pictures. We then headed towards a restaurant and had some food and Henri made sure to ask for any dietary requirements and allergies too. After lunch we started on a hike which was about 45mins where we reach the blue eye at the end of the hike. Had a little swim in the cold water for about 30minutes or so and then descended back. Then, we went to theth Village and Henri gave us the history behind the place and had some free time to check some towers and churches out. Had a small snack break and we headed back home. Overall, the hike was really good and the views were amazing along with the blue eyes. Would definitely recommend it! :))

reviews.name: Elfe
reviews.title: Unforgettable Albanian adventure
reviews.comment: For starters, you get directly picked up and dropped off from where you’re staying, which is a great way to start and end any day long adventure. The views throughout the day span across endless green and rocky mountains which you’ll climb to see two waterfalls. I recommend taking a dip in the water despite how freezing cold it is! Henri, our tour guide was excellent not only giving the history along the way but also was like hanging out with a dear friend. He even helped out two stranded tourists whose car got a flat and they joined us for the trip, which was very fun! By the end of the day he managed to get them to a mechanic. I highly recommend this tour, especially with Henri, to get the best views of the north of Albania! 🇦🇱⛰️

reviews.name: Jodie
reviews.title: Long day, worth every minute
reviews.comment: Great day out. Guide Nolan was lovely and friendly. It’s a long day. 16 hours start to finish. The transport was a Volvo XC90. Was a bit hot for my liking. The trip and guide were great. The lunch was lovely and the staff at restaurant very friendly. Don’t underestimate how hard these short hikes will be in the 38 degree heat. Be prepared with snacks and water before you go. You can pick some stuff up en route. But it’s a long way before you get there. Wear apt clothing and footwear. Hiking boots or shoes recommended. Do it. You won’t regret it.

reviews.name: Polly
reviews.title: Beautiful stops and delicious lunch
reviews.comment: What an amazing trip!! This is an absolute must if you are in Tirana! The trip was amazing from start to finish. All of the stops were incredibly beautiful. The included lunch was absolutely delicious and Henri was an amazing guide. He was so informative and able to answer any questions we had. He was so friendly and so easy to chat to. Would definitely recommend this tour. Worth every penny!

reviews.name: Prathyusha M
reviews.title: Absolutely wonderful experience
reviews.comment:
Best trip ever. The alps, Theth village and the blue eye, everything was so mesmerizing. The hike was grueling, but the destination was so worth it. All the hike and sun was forgotten in an instant once we reached the blue eye. So very beautiful.
My tour guide Ana was the absolute sweetest. She went above and beyond to make sure our group was comfortable. The long car rides were so interesting because of her, as she gave tidbits of history and cultural information throughout the trip. I loved traveling with her so much that I booked another private tour with her to the beaches.
Lunch was included in the package, so that was a plus. The lunch was really delicious too. Another guide was Henri, who was amazing. Throughout the hike he made sure we were safe, he took breaks with us, even carried a child(of another tourist) and hiked alongside us. Absolute best travel experience because of these two. Totally recommend this, once in a lifetime experience. Makes us feel alive

reviews.name: Jennie S
reviews.title: Long day but worth it.
reviews.comment: A long day but well worth it. The landscape is beautiful and the Blue Eye is amazing, wouldn't have found it without a guide! Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: Rachel F
reviews.title: Fabulous day in the mountains with Henri!
reviews.comment:
This trip was amazing. As my friends and I discussed our most favorite part of our Albania trip, the day we spent with Henri in the Balkan Alps was a unanimous highlight. First, Henri mad the trip for us. He was easy to talk to, willingly shared interesting information and history about this area of Albania, and navigated us skillfully up and down hairpin turns as he drove us in and out of Theth.

Our group hiked at different rates and Henri stayed with the slower members of our group and patiently helped when needed. He knew when to lead and guide and also when to get out of our way so we could create our own experience.

The scenery on this trip can't be beat. We visited the Northern Blue Eye first with Henri and the Southern Blue Eye on our own. The Northern Blue Eye in the mountains was by far the more spectacular.

This is a long day with lots of time in the van, but the ride is interesting and in many places very scenic. It's a great way to spend a day of your vacation. You won't be sorry. And if Henri is your guide, you are very lucky!

reviews.name: J P
reviews.title: Stunning Views - Must Visit
reviews.comment: The trip was amazing... Theth is beautiful... The scenery is stunning... Elton our guide was professional, knowledgeable and punctual.. Definitely recommend...

reviews.name: Julia M
reviews.title: A must see when you visit Albania
reviews.comment: This tour gives you a little taster of the Albanian Alps which has invited us to explore them further at some point. We enjoyed the scenic views, the hike to the blue eye and the swim therein (despite the water being very cold ) We could not stop taking pictures . The stop at Teth was enjoyable but the church was closed that day. (only open on sSunday) On the road there was a zip line somewhere. Nolan our guide let us go on it , so this was a great break for my 14 year old , because there is a lot of driving. I would highly recommend this tour .

reviews.name: Rachel S
reviews.title: Amazing full day experience
reviews.comment:
my group was 3 tourists + 1 guide

Guide 10/10
Marsuel was our guide, he’s fun and caring. excellent driving skills

View 10/10
Stunning views on the mountain, saw a lot of interesting things along the road as well

Experience 10/10
Wonderful

reviews.name: claudia g
reviews.title: Increible
reviews.comment:
La experiencia ha sido muy buena, Nolan, el guía, ha sido muy amable con nosotros.
Las vistas han sido muy bonitas.
Theth y blue eye han sido lo mejor.

reviews.name: Marcello Centonze
reviews.title: Un must per chi viene a Tirana, consigliatissimo!
reviews.comment: È stata un'esperienza unica, fare hiking in mezzo alla natura incontaminata e sentire l'aria pura della montagna non ha prezzo. La nostra guida, Nolan, è stato gentilissimo e cortese nei nostri confronti. Per chi viene a Tirana è un must che consiglio a tutti.

reviews.name: Melissa G
reviews.title: Great tour and tour guide!
reviews.comment:
Great tour! I went solo and was pleased to know basically the rest of the group was all solo travelers too. Anna was our tour guide for the day in as she assisted the main tour guide since it was her first day. She was great; energetic and very personable! We had great conversations on the car ride.
The ride up the north mountains is beautiful and so is the blue eye! The blue eye water is very cool like freezing ice bath water. So if you’re able to take a swim after the hike kudos to you! But atleast it was worth putting our feet in the cool off from the heat.

reviews.name: Aly Marx
reviews.title: A trip to be remembered
reviews.comment:
This trip is a must go to! The views are unbelievable, the hiking was 10/10 and the vibes immaculate.

Henri and Noli were amazing! They were so fun and knowledgeable, couldn’t ask for better guides.

The lunch was delicious too.

Don’t miss out on this!

reviews.name: Amani Z
reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.comment: This journey stands out as one of the finest experiences. Henry, who was one of the guides in all our Albanian trips, exhibited exceptional patience throughout our travels.

reviews.name: Filip
reviews.title: Incredible scenery, but needs improvement
reviews.comment: The destination was absolutely stunning - breathtaking mountains and views, truly worth visiting. Unfortunately, the tour organization was disappointing. The group had about 20 people instead of the promised 15, making it crowded. The minibus was uncomfortable, smelled of fuel, and it was hard to hear the guide due to poor speakers. The guide’s behavior was unprofessional — he has 2 drinks during the tour, walked too fast for some participants, and even disappeared at one point. The recommended restaurant was also a letdown: cold fries, poor-quality meat, and a dismissive reaction when we shared feedback. Overall, the place itself is amazing, but the tour needs much better organization, a professional guide, and higher quality to truly match the beauty of the destination.

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Better notice needed
reviews.comment: The earlier start, 1 hour, should be announced in time. There was no opportunity to cancel anymore

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Not very informative
reviews.comment: guide was just ok. no good information about the trip

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Difficult hike in hot weather
reviews.comment: Theth and the Blue Eye were beautiful. The driver was incredibly careful and safe. Unfortunately the guide, Anest, was frequently rude to the driver and about the driver (to the guests) for driving too slowly and even worse actively goaded a second driver into driving very dangerously on the mountain roads to "prove he was the best", upsetting some guests. Hopefully his criticisms will not reflect badly on the driver who was very safe and all guests we spoke to preferred. Please do not encourage this behaviour in future. People booking should be aware that the hike was very difficult in 30° heat with no shade and dangerous in parts (more climbing than hiking), with Anest going at an unsustainable rate for even some of the fittest of our group. This was apparently for timing but we then spent almost 2hrs at lunch. The company should consider whether this tour is suitable in such weather conditions, as if all tours are like this an accident is likely to happen even for high fitness.

reviews.name: Thy M
reviews.title: Knowledgeable and accommodating tour guides!
reviews.comment: My friend and I were travelling from Durres Beach to Theth and wanted to explore the area with some guidance as it was our first time in Albania. Nolan and our driver were incredibly accommodating, helpful and knowledgeable- providing historical information and constantly checking in to make sure we were okay! They catered the day to the travellers which was very comforting. Amazing experience- I highly recommend this tour!

reviews.name: Ansley S
reviews.title: 10 out of 10
reviews.comment: I can’t say enough good things about this tour! The small group size was perfect, and the tour guide was knowledgeable and enjoyable to talk to. The stops along the day trip were well timed and absolutely beautiful. Pick up and drop off from my Airbnb in Tirana made it that much better. Definitely a young persons tour as the hike was medium level but so much fun.

reviews.name: Ricky V
reviews.title: Beautiful tour!
reviews.comment: Just got back from one of the best days in Albania. This tour is spectacular. Don’t hesitate. We were guided by Nolan. He was amazing. A great driver and knowledgeable about the area. He was also fun and kind. The lunch was delicious.

reviews.name: Soumik T
reviews.title: Must go trip in Tirana
reviews.comment:
The trip was as amazing as said. Special thanks to Nolan our guide. Very polite and helpful. He provided most information that was possible. We said that we had heard of zipline in Theth and he stopped at the place where it happens.
In the hike he was keeping a good eye as to how we were doing and was encouraging at every step. Had he not been there we doubt we would have reached the Blue eye.
I would suggest everyone to try this trip and you would be very happy if you have Nolan as your guide.
Keep up the good work team.

reviews.name: Isabel W
reviews.title: Bloody amazing
reviews.comment:
This tour was absolutely amazing… From the moment my friend and I were picked up we felt welcomed and ready for an adventure.

It was refreshing to meet people who wanted to explore the same place and our tour guide was a friendly and easy going dude. We very much enjoyed our time on this day.

The tour was spectacular and well set out. We were able to see many places with some backstory/history of each place.

The water was beautiful and lunch was an absolute bonus !

Overall, terrific time and I would definitely return… thank you :))

reviews.name: karine r
reviews.title: Une incroyable excursion !
reviews.comment:
Je voudrais remercier Henri pour cette magnifique expérience !
L'excursion était incroyable et le guide nous as bien tout expliqué malgré que nous avons quelques difficultés en anglais
C'était une magnifique randonnée qui restera gravée dans nos souvenirs d'Albanie !

reviews.name: Jonė M
reviews.title: Great tour, totally worth it
reviews.comment:
A great experience - all day with lots of interesting locations to see and beautiful views :)
Our tour guide was Henri, who was extremely helpful and friendly, told tons of cool stories, showed all the beautiful views!

reviews.name: yosif2018
reviews.title: Great tour of Blue Eye and Theth
reviews.comment: This was a great tour experience. Henri the tour guide was great--everything from setting up pickup times the day before, to ensuring adequate breaks for refreshment, to chatting with everyone. What stands out most was his advice to completely douse our shirts in the stream before the long hike to the Blue Eye. That was a life saver on such a hot day. Great day, great companions.

reviews.name: Aidan M
reviews.title: Amazing Day in Theth with Noli
reviews.comment: My partner and I spent a fun, picturesque, and beautiful day in Theth National Park. Noli was a knowledgable and funny guide, very familiar with the area and his country. He surprised us was a juice and a candy bar at the beginning of the trip. We learned a lot about Albanian history and culture on the drive. He’s also a confident and safe driver, very skilled on narrow mountain roads. The destinations were beautiful, the trip was well designed, and the day went by without incident. Absolutely would recommend a day with Noli in Theth!

reviews.name: Lukasz M
reviews.title: Albanian Alps with Blue Eye !
reviews.comment:
I recently had the pleasure of experiencing a tour with Albanian Alps, and it was nothing short of amazing! From the moment we arrived, the guide was incredibly welcoming and organized, ensuring that every detail of our trip was taken care of.

Overall, Albanian Alps provided an exceptional travel experience that was both enriching and relaxing. I highly recommend them to anyone looking to explore the beauty and culture of Albanian mountains tour with blue eye

reviews.name: Natalia Vashina
reviews.title: Gorgeous tour to Albanian alps
reviews.comment:
Great tour to Albanian Alps and Theth for the whole day! Highly recommended!
It was really fantastic, unforgetable experience, I felt in love with this region.
Noli is great guide, very friendly and positive!

The road to our destination was gorgeous with breathtaking views, we have several stops for coffee and panorama views.
We had lunch before hiking at scenic place and after that had hiking to Blue eye (don't forget swimsuits :) ).
We also visited church at Theth village.
Noli - you're the best, thank you for such memories!

reviews.name: thaicurry81
reviews.title: Wonderful day in the Albanian mountains
reviews.comment: It was a wonderful day with marvellous views, two little hikes to beautiful places and a swim in clear blue water. Nolan nicely guided us through the day. He answered all of our questions, responded to our wishes, adapted the order of the tour very well to the weather and was a very good driver on the windy and narrow mountain roads. Thank you for that perfect day!

reviews.name: Discover27371878226
reviews.title: The best excursion that you cannot missed with Nolan
reviews.comment: Nolan has been a great guide, fun and super energetic! He took us to two of the most beautiful waterfalls in Albania. He told us many local stories and made us have a really nice day. super recommended Nolan and super recommended the tour, all very nice!

reviews.name: Mohdmuneer
reviews.title: Not to be missed
reviews.comment: Theth national park day tour is the highlight of my visit to Albania. The road is scenic and the water falls and the blue eye were absolutely fascinating. Henri and Noli our tour guides were very friendly and helpful by all means.

reviews.name: taylor h
reviews.title: Best hike ever
reviews.comment: Highlight of our trip for sure! Our guide Nolan gave us a lot of interesting facts and took us to all the best places! The lunch we were served was amazing. We absolutely recommend this to any traveler

reviews.name: Danielle M
reviews.title: Nolan rocks!!!!
reviews.comment: Best day trip I’ve taken this summer!! Nolan was an amazing guide, he was so nice, helpful, and informative. My three girlfriends and I had the best day with him!! The hike was absolutely stunning, and the food during lunch was amazing. Would 10/10 recommend.

reviews.name: Audrey H
reviews.title: Day full of adventures!
reviews.comment: Had such an amazing trip with our tour guide Nolan! A day full of hiking, waterfalls, and old villages. Nolan was amazing and felt like we were vacationing with a friend. One of our favorite days from the trip

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Expected more for the price
reviews.comment: Super expensive and only 2 stops made it for the entire trip ( unbelievable) we didn’t even went for all the place that was mentioned. I was so excited about this trip, and everything was not meant to be. The day started with being late one hour ( understandable) but a better communication could improve customer service. Than during the whole trip, we didn’t get any information at all about Albania, we were divided in two cars, I was in the car without the guide, but even that, when we arrived to the place, none of the information being given. So basically you paying just to be driven there and that’s all . Don’t be fooled it’s too expensive, there some more cheap tours, more beautiful and interesting than this .

reviews.name: tombruehlrhl3
reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.comment: The tour was amazing. It's a good deal visiting Bovilla Lake and Kruja in one day. The tour guide did a very good job also. Excellent service. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Endi F
reviews.title: Just Amazing
reviews.comment: Very nice experience. We did some rock climbing just for fun. Very good view. Also Kruja City was a historic gem. A very nice itinerary combining both a nature excursion and a cultural one. Totally worth it

reviews.name: Christian C
reviews.title: Perfect day trip
reviews.comment:
Amazing day trip from Tirana..so you can see nature and history comparing to other tours.
Thanks to our guide. He is really kind :)

reviews.name: Anmol S
reviews.title: Very special tour
reviews.comment: I want to leave a review especially for the Bovilla Lake & Kruja City. Wonderful tour. Both Bovilla and Kruja. We also waited for the sunset at the top of the mountain of Kruja. We thank Henri so much for this experience. We truly enjoyed the tour.

reviews.name: Edren Pete I
reviews.title: The other side of Tirana and Kruja
reviews.comment:
I had a great time exploring Tirana and Kruja. If you prefer hiking, nature, snow, mountains, low-key places and other outdoor activities, I highly recommend visiting Lake Bovilla, the Old bazaar of Kruja and Sarisalltik. It's worth the trip.

A big thanks to Henrih for the support and hospitality. Faleminderit for organizing my private tour.

reviews.name: Elle P
reviews.title: A relaxing day!
reviews.comment:
The road is not accessible via public transportation and for those who are not comfortable with driving in a bad road I would advise to find a driver. But in the end of the road a wonderful place awaits. You wouldn't expect to find a random coffee shop in the top of the mountain but in Albania everything is possible XD. We enjoyed a coffee with an amazing view, climbed for about 10 minutes (a portion of the climb is rocky but safe and the rest with stairs, pretty safe). I would describe the energy and feeling that you get on the top as peace. Sitting on a rock looking at nature. Don't miss Bovila Lake!

P.S Kruja was a wonderful place to visit also. Good combo!

reviews.name: Marcelo D
reviews.title: Perfect perfect perfect
reviews.comment: Fantastic day! On our last day we booked this tour since is close by and the tour operator was so kind to drop us off directly at the airport which is 30 minutes from Kruja . This tour was amazing, we had so much fun seeing the lake and the castle of Kruja. If you have a late flight (after 6) this tour would be perfect. Enjoy!!!!!

reviews.name: Scenic25751966516
reviews.title: Bovilla lake and kruje tour
reviews.comment: Very good tour. Our tour guide Elton was very friendly and relaxed. Very much recommend. The lake is beautiful . Definitely worth it

reviews.name: Agnieszka B
reviews.title: Trip to Bovilla Lake and Kruja City
reviews.comment: Great trip and the best guides ever. Very professional and interesting. Views are amazing; very good place for trekking

reviews.name: Hankahl
reviews.title: Tirana to lake Bovilla & Kruje -tour
reviews.comment:
We had a lovely day out with our tour guide Nolan. Very informative & knowledgeable, friendly.
First stop Bovilla lake- absolutely gorgeous views. For the brave ones ,you can go to a viewing platform for more great views. Then continued to the Old bazaar of Kruja & Kruja castle.

reviews.name: Resort226743
reviews.title: Great tour to Bovilla Lake and Kruje
reviews.comment: Had a fabulous tour with Nolan. Firstly went to Bovilla Lake followed by Kruje old bazaar and Castle. Very good driver and very informative. Adapted the tour to our needs and gave recommendations for restaurants and what to do in Tirana.

reviews.name: Vincent M
reviews.title: Great day with Nolan
reviews.comment:
We had a very pleasant day with Nolan : safe driver and nice person.
We had time to explore every spots on the program.
I will definitely recommand Nolan as a guide for your future travel plans !

reviews.name: Marketa M
reviews.title: Take all my money 🙏
reviews.comment: We have very plesant day with Nolan. He was very kind, good English speaking, really good driver. He also give us a lot of inside into Albanian culture and history of the Kroja. I can recommend him 100%. Thanks a lot for great time!

reviews.name: L'ubomir B
reviews.title: Perfect trip at the end of our vacation in Albania.
reviews.comment:
We really enjoyed the whole trip!
Our guide Nolan was a nice guy.
He was on time and his English was really god. Also respect to his car skills. It was quick,and save given the difficulty of the road.
His knowledge of Albania history was also great.

reviews.name: Ondrej M
reviews.title: Really nice and educative trip with great guide
reviews.comment:
The trip was really amazing!
Even though we had a car we wouldn’t be able to fit trip to both places within one day since it was not fit for offroad.
Trip with Nolan was not only really efficient but also educative since Nolan was really friendly and could answer our questions regarding culture and history of both places we visited. His english was also really good.
Trip was also nicely paced, we didn’t have to rush anywhere but we still managed to finish it nicely so we had also spare time when we returned back to Tirana
I can only recommend, both lake Boville and Kruje were beautiful and with this bundle you can see both in one day.

reviews.name: Kais c
reviews.title: Excursion au top.
reviews.comment:
Très belle excursion en présence de Tony.
Nous avons fait notre sortie en famille avec nos enfants de 1 et 3 ans.
Tout cela s’est bien passé, voiture adapté pour mettre nos poussettes.
Tony est très sympa, de bon conseil, compétence linguistique riche.
Nous recommandons cette excursion.

reviews.name: Roam178379
reviews.title: The Trip with the essentials of Albanian history!
reviews.comment:
We had an 8 hrs trip with Nolan who had a lot of knowledge about Albanian’s history and was a really good storyteller.
We can really recommend the trip - also a nice time of the year to travel around.

reviews.name: Connor E
reviews.title: Excellent service and Excellent Trip
reviews.comment:
The tour and our tour guide (Nolan) was superb. Excellent service from the moment we were picked up from our hotel through to being dropped back off. Nolan our guide was very knowledgeable and also gave us many tips and recommendations for the rest of our time that we will spend in Tirana. Highly recommend , truly 5 star.

Thank you !

reviews.name: Sindie P
reviews.title: Lac Bovilla et Kruja
reviews.comment:
Ana et Nolan sont de super guides ! J'ai passé une excellente journée en leur compagnie ! Une belle connexion ! J'avais l'impression de les connaître depuis toujours.
Les paysages étaient magnifiques et leurs explications précieuses.
Ils ont tout fait pour que la journée se passe parfaitement !
Le lac bovilla est splendide.
Kruja est une ville chargée d'histoire et très mignonne.
Je recommande !!!

reviews.name: linda i
reviews.comment: The views from this tour were nothing short of enthralling. Nolan was very helpful and a lovely guide. It was my birthday and he went the extra mile to get me a cupcake and took amazing pictures of me

reviews.name: samashman
reviews.title: Amazing Trip to Bovilla and Kruja
reviews.comment: Amazing trip to Bovilla and Kruja. Our guide Elton has fantastic and very knowledgable and made the experience for us. I cannot recommend this tour enough.

reviews.name: Jonny D
reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.comment: Great experience with a great host in Elton. Getting to see Lake Bovilla and Kruja is well worth doing during your time in Tiranë

reviews.name: Wamwill
reviews.title: Belle journée
reviews.comment:
Très belle expérience avec Elton notre chauffeur.
Vue magnifique
Beaucoup de route entre les deux attractions mois sympa

reviews.name: Alex Hannah
reviews.title: Fantastic service
reviews.comment: We used Tony today he was a great driver and tour guide. Nothing was to much of a ask. And we asked a lot of questions. Would highly recommend for any tours.

reviews.name: Eliška Zemanová
reviews.title: Very nice guide
reviews.comment: Tour bovilla - the guide was very nice, I recommend to everyone.

reviews.name: Karl G
reviews.title: Perfect day from Tirana
reviews.comment: Henry was great. He made sure that I see all the attractions while ensuring that he keeps to my pace. We patiently explained the background of the places we visited. Although it was a very long day, time flew as he is also very good company.

reviews.name: Endi F
reviews.title: A trip to remember
reviews.comment: Did not expect Gjirokastra to be that beautiful. We explored the market, and the castle had an old prison, which was interesting. Many guns were just lying there; you could pick them up. Also, visited an old house showing how the rich used to live back in the day. Our guide, Henri, is very adventurous and fun. Had two days with him. A wonderful experience.

reviews.name: Flavio Y
reviews.title: Wonderful Experience!
reviews.comment: Spent a wonderful day in Gjirokastra. I would rate it as the most beautiful and interesting cultural city of Albania. We sa the bazaar, the castle, prison, museum and Zekate House. We also had Lunch in KARDHASHI tavern. A very good and recommend experience.

reviews.name: Rey S
reviews.title: Incredible experience in Albania
reviews.comment: Visited Gjirokaster and Blue Eye this month (February). Gjirokaster is the most beautiful city of Albania, a must see. The Blue Eye was lovely also. We loved this tour and the tour guide was awesome.

reviews.name: NSE186402
reviews.title: Memorable Trip: Tirana to Ohrid
reviews.comment: A truly excellent trip with our guide, from Tirana to Ohrid. Henri is attentive, tremendously knowledgeable and truly tailors the trip to you. So rare to have a tour that includes a traditional lunch too! We’ve since learned that Albanian Travel & Tours provides trips across the Balkan region, we will certainly return and book with Henri again. Thank you! ️

reviews.name: Brajan L
reviews.title: Fantastic day in Ohrid
reviews.comment: We had an amazing time in Ohrid. We toured around Ohrid Lake and made several stops like Saint Naum and Lin which were nice. Ohrid was a marvel. Our guide Noli was so kind and ready to assist us with everything. Very good service highly recommend

reviews.name: Susi
reviews.title: Lake Ohrid with Nolan
reviews.comment: Nolan was a fantastic tour guide ! Lovely person and had a lot of good knowledge. Very helpful and kind Ohrid was simply beautiful too ! An amazing day trip !

reviews.name: Samah K
reviews.title: North Macedonia day trip
reviews.comment: Excellent tour. Nolan was a wonderful guide, very calm and a good driver. Nice to see, Ohrid especially the lake and the fortress.

reviews.name: Shin Tang
reviews.title: Just Amazing
reviews.comment: it is a wonderful day trip to Ohrid. My guide is Henri, he is very nice and friendly! He gave us the enough time to enjoy the day and the view. He led us to the best view point of Ohrid!

reviews.name: Samantha C
reviews.title: 5/5 Experience with Nolan
reviews.comment: I had an amazing trip with Nolan. He was very kind the whole time and made sure that everything was going well for the trip. Ohrid is a beautiful place that is well worth visiting from Tirana.

reviews.name: Ayaka
reviews.title: オフリドが1日で効率よく回れます
reviews.comment:
2名で参加し、他の参加者がいなかったためプライベートツアーのような形になりました。基本は英語での案内ですが、ドライバー兼ガイドのNolanさんがオフリド内で詳しく説明してくれたり、効率よく回れるよう調整してくれたりしたおかげで、とても楽しい時間を過ごせました。

Thank you, Nolan! It was a pleasure joining the tour with you!

reviews.name: Tonnies Z
reviews.title: Ein unvergesslicher Ausflug nach Ohrid mit Nolan!
reviews.comment:
Wir hatten das große Glück, Ohrid im Rahmen eines Tagesausflugs mit Nolan zu entdecken – und wir sind begeistert!
Die Altstadt ist wunderschön mit ihren kleinen Gassen, historischen Gebäuden und der atemberaubenden Aussicht auf den See.

Die Kombination aus Kultur, Natur und der unglaublich freundlichen Atmosphäre hat diesen Ausflug zu einem echten Highlight gemacht. Der Fahrer war auch super und es hat einfach richtig viel Spaß gemacht!

Auch alleine kann man die Tour gut machen, da man von dem Guide auch in die Gruppe eingebunden wird oder ggf. auch eher für sich sein kann.

Wir können jedem nur empfehlen, Ohrid mit dieser Tour und diesem Guide zu besuchen.

reviews.name: Marcelo P
reviews.title: Es buena la experiencia con voluntad del guia.
reviews.comment:
Es bueno el tour y los lugares visitados.
El guia tiene buena voluntad podria dar mayores explicaciones en la ruta.
Igualmente es bueno.
El bus no tiene wifi

reviews.name: Liva A
reviews.title: Veldig fornøyd
reviews.comment: Veldig trivelig og hjelpsomme guider. Jeg misforstod opplegget angående henting og drop-off men selskapet var velvillige og hjelpsomme i å finne den beste løsningen. Tour-guide Henry var veldig hyggelig og vi følte oss godt ivaretatt og trygg. Han hadde masse kunnskaper og var veldig god i engelsk!

reviews.name: MARK100Herts
reviews.title: Great day trip
reviews.comment:
We had a great day on this trip to Macedonia. Collection from out hotel was on time, where we were taken to meet the rest of the group and minibus, which in turn took us to meet our coach.
There was plenty of room to spread out ( about 20 on our trip) and the air con was very welcome.
The drive is about 2.5 hours to Ohrid, with a stop on route but it passes very quickly and is a good way of seeing some of Albania.
The walking tour of the town was very informative and took in some great view points. Be prepared for some hill walking but nothing that bothered us.
Henri was a nice bloke and looked after us well, keeping the group well informed and the tour together nicely.
Ohrid is lovely as are the other stops on the trip including St Naum.
We were glad we took this trip.
We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend it.

reviews.name: Gordon M
reviews.title: Worthwhile trip from Tirana
reviews.comment: A very enjoyable day, taking in the beauty of Lake Ohrid. Our tour guide Henri was very good, unfortunately I was in a following car with a driver who didn't speak any English although he spoke fluent French with the two other French passengers on the back seat...for hours on end, I have a little knowledge of French but struggled to understand and felt a little excluded and missing out on information. That aside, it was still a good trip.

reviews.name: Christine S
reviews.title: Not to be Missed: Lake Ohrid & Saint Naum, North Macedonia
reviews.comment: We visited Ohrid Lake, North Macedonia, during our stay in Tirana, Albania. It was an excellent day trip. Every experience was fun and interesting. The views of the lake and the churches are breathtaking. Philippe, our local guide, was very knowledgeable about the region, and Nolan, our guide from Tirana, did an excellent job coordinating the whole trip. I highly recommend this day trip from Tirana.

reviews.name: Elodie P
reviews.title: Such a pleasant trip !
reviews.comment:
Such a beautiful trip !
Our guide Nolan was so nice and a real pleasure to be with !
The city of Ohrid is gorgeous and so peaceful !
The monastery is also beautiful !
Martina, our guide in Ohrid was such a delighh !
I recommend this trip !
The only inconvenient is that now I would want to come back in North Macedonia to stay more !

reviews.name: Veronica R
reviews.title: A must do while in Tirana!
reviews.comment:
Couldn’t have asked for a better tour guide! Henri was fabulous and handled everything with professionalism. There was an accident on the main highway going back to Tirana and due to the delay, he went the extra mile to ensure the safety and wellbeing of each participant, he arranged and paid everyone’s taxi back home. The tour itself was well organized and well worth the money, the views were breathtaking!! (minus the national park, felt more like a petting zoo - but by then we were all ready to go home so it was a nice toilet break). Henri was very attentive to all the participants of the tour, answering promptly and courteously, just for Henri, my parents and I would do the tour all over again.

Also, the bus driver was very friendly and safe with the crazy driving of Albania. The bus accommodations were top notch! New and clean.

reviews.name: EddieReid
reviews.title: A worthwhile trip
reviews.comment:
We had an excellent and enjoyable trip hosted by Nolan.
A longish journey but visiting Orhid and a step into North Macedonia makes it worth it.
A small group tour which was good…. Minibus could have been more comfortable.

reviews.name: Gillian Krenzin
reviews.title: Day trip to Ohrid.
reviews.comment: Day started with bus issues related to leaking air conditioner. It took a while to sort out but we were quickly back on track. Our guide Anest was professional throughout, very informative and willing to answer all questions and share his knowledge. The guide in Ohrid was equally professional and informative We had to divert on the way home due to heavy traffic, again it was very well handled by Anest. I would recommend the trip to Ohrid and our guide Anest.

reviews.name: David A
reviews.title: Excellent trip from Tirana to Ohrid
reviews.comment: Great trip from Tirana, Albania to Ohrid, North Macedonia. Ohrid is very pretty with plenty of interesting history. Nolan was a very knowledgeable guide and ensured we had enough time throughout the day to stop for food, photos, rest and souvenirs. There were only two of us, but Nolan still went ahead with a private tour which was much appreciated. Would highly recommend booking this tour.

reviews.name: Savio
reviews.title: 10/10 – highly recommended
reviews.comment: Beautiful day trip to North Macedonia from Tirana. 10/10 would highly recommend this trip. The spots covered during this trip are really very good and picturesque. Our guide Sokol was really helpful and informative and helped us wherever he could. Had a great time during this trip altogether!!

reviews.name: Omar
reviews.title: Friendly and knowledgeable guide
reviews.comment: The tour guide -Anest- was very friendly and knowledgeable. He showed us around and responded to all of our questions. Moreover, he was very punctual on picking us up. Ohrid is a very nice city to go on a day trip from Tirana

reviews.name: Annemarie
reviews.title: Lunch by the lake was perfect
reviews.comment: Really enjoyed this day trip around Lake Ohrid. It was a long drive but the scenery, once up in the mountains, was absolutely worth it. The highlight for me was lunch on the lake as we were very fortunate to have gorgeous weather. There is a lot of walking up hills, so make sure you are physically able to do that.

reviews.name: Luisa
reviews.title: Enjoyed the walking tour
reviews.comment: I think it's a very practical way to visit North Macedonia if you don't have much time, the transport was super confortable and the guide was very nice. The only suggestion I have is that the walking tour should end by the St Jovan church so who wants to enjoy some of the free time over there have that possibility, since is one of the most beautiful places I have ever seen and I would love to have more time for pictures there.

reviews.name: Kirsty
reviews.title: Perfect mix of walking and sightseeing
reviews.comment: We loved every second of our trip. Nolan, our tour guide, was excellent and we couldn’t have asked for better! The guide (I think his name was Phillipe) in North Macedonia was also excellent and we loved the walking tour and free time we had. Would definitely recommend this trip to friends ☺️

reviews.name: Chitra
reviews.title: Professional, friendly, and highly recommended
reviews.comment: Wonderful Macedonia Tour! From start to finish, the entire tour was very well organised and professional. Nolan was absolutely fantastic — patient, friendly, and always smiling. His professionalism and kindness really stood out, and he made sure everyone felt comfortable throughout the journey. In Macedonia, our guide Martina was excellent! She walked us through all the sights, shared great stories, and made the experience even more special. A big round of applause to Nolan for his great service! I would definitely join this tour again. Highly recommended! 👏🏼

reviews.name: Y
reviews.title: Loved everything about this tour
reviews.comment: Loved everything about historically rich informative tour to Macedonia. Our guide Nolan was amazing he kept us laughing while we were stuck in some unusually back logged traffic. His guidance to keep the group together and informed was on point. The Macedonia guide Stephen was awesome too. Passionately enjoys his job and vividly paints pictures in your mind to help imagine what early days would’ve looked like. The bus is premium luxury with copious amounts of space for a bigger lad too. A++ tour

reviews.name: Brian
reviews.title: Beautiful North Macedonia tour
reviews.comment: Such a beautiful tour. North Macedonia is amazing. Our guide Henri was wonderful. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Martina niceska
reviews.title: Absolutely amazing tour and guide
reviews.comment:
Absolutely Amazing Tour and Guide!
This tour was beyond incredible! Everything was so well organized, informative, and full of energy. Our guide Henry was simply outstanding, knowledgeable, funny, and genuinely passionate about what he does. You could really feel his love for the place and his desire to make sure everyone had the best possible experience.
Every stop was breathtaking, and we learned so much while having a fantastic time. It wasn’t just a tour - it was a truly unforgettable experience filled with great stories, laughter, and wonderful memories.
If you’re thinking about booking this tour, don’t hesitate, just do it! You’ll have an amazing time and come away with a heart full of joy and appreciation for this beautiful place. Highly, highly recommended! 🌟

reviews.name: Marcella Romani
reviews.title: A highlight of my Balkan travels
reviews.comment:
Unforgettable Day Trip to Ohrid Lake with Albania Inbound Tour

I had an incredible experience with Albania Inbound Tour on their day trip to Lake Ohrid in North Macedonia. From start to finish, everything was perfectly organized — comfortable transport, a knowledgeable and friendly guide, and a smooth border crossing.

The tour gave me the chance to explore the breathtaking beauty of Ohrid: charming cobblestone streets, centuries-old churches, and that unbelievable view over the lake — it felt like stepping into a postcard. Our guide enriched the trip with cultural insights and fun local stories that brought the whole place to life.

This was definitely one of the highlights of my time in the Balkans. If you’re in Albania and want to explore beyond the borders, don’t miss this experience. It’s the perfect mix of nature, history, and local charm — and Albania Inbound makes it all effortless.

reviews.name: J L Williams
reviews.title: History, exploration, and no gimmicks
reviews.comment: I took a recent trip to North Macedonia with Albania Inbound Tours and Henri was the guide for the day. It was such a great experience. They were prompt with pick up time and the van was clean and comfortable with air conditioning and a maxed group of 15 people. It was a well thought out day, not rushed, with a good mix of history explanation and time to explore solo. I also appreciate that we were not dropped off at a gimmicky shop to purchase overpriced trinkets. I would definitely recommend this company as well as a day trip to Lake Ohrid if your time in Tirana permits.

reviews.name: lena
reviews.title: Lovely tour
reviews.comment: A very relaxed itinerary, the lake was very beautiful and Ohrid was a charming town. the transportation could have been better, one of the doors was broken. Unfortunately, we couldn't go to St Naum because of the snow.

reviews.name: Hande
reviews.title: Nice day trip from Tirana
reviews.comment: It was a pleasant day in Ohrid with suberp views of the lake thanks to our guide Anest who was always ready to answer any questions and also the local guide was very knowledgeable I would thank her too and the driver of course who ensured our safety on the roads. I would recommend this trip to those who are staying in Tiran more than 3 4 days and who would like to have a flavor of a neighbor country. It is nice to have this road trip also to see a bit of country side

reviews.name: Davide S
reviews.title: It was an interesting tour of Albania and Macedonia. If you leave home after reading "Quota Albania" by Mario Rigoni Stern and w
reviews.comment: Excellent trip. The guide was punctual, attentive, precise, and knowledgeable. I recommend it. An extra star because the guide was an AC Milan fan.

reviews.name: Jason S
reviews.title: Visit to Lake Ohrid
reviews.comment: Anest is a very knowledgeable and genuine guide (and driver!) who navigated tough situations well and was able to hold any kinds of conversations with people. He is very passionate about his job and anybody on his tour would be very lucky and well taken care of.

reviews.name: Annemarie
reviews.title: Such a lovely experience
reviews.comment: We had a lovely time in a very lovely spot. Thank you for all.

reviews.name: Federico
reviews.title: Loved the Ohrid guided tour
reviews.comment: Nolan was a great guide. The whole tour was very well organized and every stop had enough time for visiting. I especially enjoyed the guided tour of Ohrid, very interesting and the guide was excellent.

reviews.name: David
reviews.title: Great experience in North Macedonia
reviews.comment: We had an excellent day in North Macedonia, travelling in from Tirana. We were picked up bang on time, the minibus was comfortable and no issues travelling in. Ohrid was lovely, a real change of pace from Tirana with some incredible history to see and hear about from our knowledgeable local tour guide, Ivana. On the the Bay of Bones which due to the time of year, wasn't open which was a shame but we were here in December. the Monastery was interesting too with an equally good view of the lake. Thanks to Nolan for taking us there and being ain interesting and informative guide. We're already thinking about visiting Ohrid again!

reviews.name: Roberto
reviews.title: Great team
reviews.comment: Perfect trip to get a little taste of North Macedonia. Both Nolan the guide and Sellam the driver made us feel comfortable and cared for the whole trip. Definitely recommended!

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.title: Comfortable journey
reviews.comment: Excellent trip overall. The drive was long, but we knew that, and the van was comfortable, and the driver very safe. He stopped whenever we asked. Collection and drop off easy. The guide was very helpful and knowledgeable - he clearly really enjoys his job and that showed. Great walking tour, along a route I would never have found for myself. He was considerate to all guests, making sure we didn't go too fast. Very interesting stories and good recommendations for lunch. Highly commendable guide all round

reviews.name: Monica
reviews.title: Ohrid is a must-see
reviews.comment: Very nice tour, comfortable bus (very important since the drive is long), Ohrid is amazing, and the guide there was very informative. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Nicholas
reviews.title: Great day in Macedonia!
reviews.comment: This day tour was great! Our guide Noli was very cool and informative. The coach was comfortable and Macedonia was beautiful. We were stuck in traffic getting back into Tirana but not their fault obviously. Would definitely recommend. PS make sure you have a visa if needed!! Some people were not able to get in Macedonia and had to leave the bus.

reviews.name: Adèle
reviews.title: One day is a lot, but worth it
reviews.comment: Nice day in Macedonia. Maybe too intense to do in one day. But nice still. The guide was really nice.

reviews.name: Oumaïma
reviews.title: Perfect day with family
reviews.comment:
The best excursion made till now, Nolan our guide was very kind and gave us a lot of information during the trip.. our local guide in Ohrid was kind as well and explain with passion the history of the city. I advice this excursion to everyone. Thank you Nolan, thank you Felipe (macedonian guide) and thank you Mr driver, my mom and I really enjoyed this excursion
The best excursion made till now, Nolan our guide was very kind and gave us a lot of information during the trip.. our local guide in Ohrid was kind as well and explain with passion the history of the city. I advice this excursion to everyone. Thank you Nolan, thank you Felipe (macedonian guide) and thank you Mr driver, my mom and I really enjoyed this excursion

reviews.name: Maria
reviews.title: Stunning views everywhere
reviews.comment: We love the breathtaking macedónia and our Ride! Everything its well planed and at time, we enjoy the light time for the stunning view all around. They guide its great and we couldnt wish more for this trip!

reviews.name: Marco
reviews.title: Helpful guide, great tips
reviews.comment: The trip was fantastic. Nolan - the guide was very knowledgeable and very helpful in providing pointers of places to visit ( and most importantly eat😋). Would recommend this trip up your visit to Tirana. Nolan - best of luck for the future. Marco from Australia

reviews.name: Kaitlyn
reviews.title: Choosing Macedonia was the right call
reviews.comment: Nolan is a fantastic guide and the trip was very smooth. Ohrid is a fun town to get a feel for North Macedonia, and I learned a lot about the country’s history in my few short hours there. I was torn between doing a day trip to Kosovo, North Macedonia, or Montenegro, and after my tour today, I am confident with my decision to choose Macedonia because this tour was so amazing! Highly recommend you book, and if you get Nolan as a guide, you’re in for a treat!

reviews.name: Sally
reviews.title: Loved Old Town tour
reviews.comment: It was well organized, pick-up very smooth. There was even a guided tour at the Ohrid Old Town. All the places were breathtakingly beautiful, I just wish we could have stayed a bit longer but traffic back to Tirana was bad, I completely understand.

reviews.name: Charles
reviews.title: Ohrid is a true gem!
reviews.comment: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Short but superb day tour in North Macedonia 🇲🇰 There are plenty of quaint cafés and charming architectural details, but the highlight was the Church of St. John at Kaneo, a must-see masterpiece. Beyond its rich history, it has a breathtaking view of Lake Ohrid’s crystal-clear blue waters. Tip: Try the boat taxi option on your way back. It saves time for shopping. ☺️ The Macedonian ruby is definitely a must-buy souvenir! The Monastery of Saint Naum was another serene stop, perfect for those seeking a calm, nature-filled escape. Ohrid is truly a gem! Huge thanks to our tour guide Nolan, who was knowledgeable, engaging, and spoke excellent English. He even checked on us after the drop-off, such a thoughtful gesture. The day was so well-curated from start to finish, definitely one of the best experiences in the Balkans. ♥️

reviews.name: Fiona Morton
reviews.title: Super day trip to Ohrid
reviews.comment: Our day trip to North Macedonia/Lake Ohrid, from Tirana, was super. Our guide Nolan and driver Sula were excellent - very professional, competent and also friendly! I would recommend anyone who wishes to see Ohrid to book this tour. Thank you, guys, for a great day!

reviews.name: louise
reviews.title: Exactly as promised, amazing trip
reviews.comment: The trip was exactly what was promised on the itinerary. The trip was very well organised and Nolan was very friendly throughout and made sure we all had a good time. The drive to Orhid is long however the views more than make up for it and Nolan provides information when passing certain points which was informative. Phillip, the guide in Macedonia was excellent also - it was a very scenic tour around the town. I am very glad I booked this trip, it was one of the highlights of my holiday. It is worth taking euros as you can get the boat from the last stop on the guided tour in Orhid back to the starting point which was 5 euros and also it was 3 euros if you wanted to go into Saint Naum however I thought it was beautiful just walking around the grounds itself. Thank you for a great trip Nolan and Phillip

reviews.name: Enriko
reviews.title: Enjoyed every moment
reviews.comment: The trip was very nice and i did enjoy my time visiting Lake Ohrid.The ride went smooth.NOLAN who was our driver and our tour guide made sure to make our trip perfect.Would highly recommend it to everyone.Its worth the money!

reviews.name: Marleen
reviews.title: Really enjoyed it 😊
reviews.comment: Thank you Nolan for the amazing tour and with the great transportation:) enjoyed it a lot 😊

reviews.name: Lee
reviews.title: Breathtaking lake views
reviews.comment: Really great trip, Lake Ohrid has an other worldly beauty. Our guide Nolan was organised, informative, warm and professional. We saw plenty on the trip but were mostly blown away by the beauty of the lake. I would highly recommend this trip.

reviews.name: Priya
reviews.title: Truly worth it!
reviews.comment: I joined the day trip to Ohrid, Macedonia, and it was perfectly organized! Our main guide, Nolan, was super friendly and shared great tips along the way. After reaching Ohrid, we had a local guide who was very knowledgeable and fun, making the visit even better. We got enough time at every stop, and the border crossing went smoothly since the guide handled all the customs. Overall, a well-planned and enjoyable trip, truly worth it!

reviews.name: Scott
reviews.title: Special trip, highly recommended
reviews.comment: Wonderful tour, everything was great. The guide the transport, sites and food. I have wanted to see Macedonia for a long time and this tour really is special. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Katie
reviews.title: Ohrid was beautiful
reviews.comment: The trip was very fun and well organised. Everything was very clearly communicated. The tour of Ohrid was beautiful but did feel quite rushed as we only had 2.5 hours there. Transportation on the way back l was disrupted by traffic but Nolan, the tour guide, was very helpful and walked us to the taxi he’d arranged for us - he went above and beyond.

reviews.name: Islem
reviews.title: Everything ran perfectly
reviews.comment: I had a great experience with this tour company. The pick-up and drop-off were arranged exactly as I requested, directly from my hotel. The timing was perfectly organized, so I didn’t have to wait at all. The trip itself was very interesting, and our guide in Ohrid was extremely knowledgeable. She led us through all the must-see places and explained everything in detail. I highly recommend this company to anyone who wants to explore Macedonia and the beautiful city of Ohrid.

reviews.name: Tom
reviews.title: You can tell he loves his job
reviews.comment: Our guide today, Nolan, was excellent. We traveled from Tirana to Ohrid and the lake, and he made the whole day easy and enjoyable. He was friendly, helpful, clear with communication, and had a great sense of humor that kept the group in good spirits. You can tell he enjoys what he does, and it really shows. A great guide all around.

reviews.name: yaz
reviews.title: Smooth experience all around
reviews.comment: I would recommend this trip to everyone that is coming into Albania. These guys really know their stuff and the whole experience was really smooth. Special shoutout to my guide Henri, he is a great guide and ensured everyone had a good time!

reviews.name: Annbjørg
reviews.title: Great day, couldn’t ask for more
reviews.comment: We had an amazing trip with a very nice and knowledgeable guide (Nolan). The trips was well organised and the timing of the stops were on point. Highly recommended 🫶🏻

reviews.name: Xoli
reviews.title: Overall, a really great trip
reviews.comment: I appreciated the hotel pick-up that was very convenient. Nolan and Phillip were great guides and knowledgeable. In terms of experience, it can potentially be enhanced with onboard wifi, charging ports and simple refreshments like chilled water. Otherwise the experience was absolutely great and money well spent.

reviews.name: Diana
reviews.title: Perfect day exploring
reviews.comment: We had a wonderful day. Good organised, the guide Nolan and the driver did all they can to give us a nice trip!

reviews.name: Nabila
reviews.title: Lovely walking tour
reviews.comment: The guide Ramadan was a sweet gentleman. Ohrid walking tour was also good. Ohrid was charming. The drive is quite long and border control takes quite some time! But overall good tour.

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Beautiful lake and city
reviews.comment: Our guide and driver were the same person, and I am grateful for his efforts in making our day enjoyable. It seemed like he might have been a bit tired, which could have affected the overall experience. Despite this, the lake and city are stunning, and we had plenty of free time to explore the city.

reviews.name: Helen B
reviews.title: Lovely day trip from Tirana
reviews.comment: We had a great day out to Lake Ohrid. Beautiful place and good to learn about the history as well as enjoy the scenery. The drive was lovely with some good photo stops. It was listed as having WiFi on the bus which wasn't available which was probably a good thing as made us focus on enjoying the journey. Noli was helpful and friendly.

reviews.name: Marcel v
reviews.title: Excursie nieuw Macedonië
reviews.comment: Leuk uitstapje om even uit Tirana te ontsnappen. Nadeel dat er vaak kort tijd is om de dingen te bekijken. Verder wel goed georganiseerd. Houdt er wel rekening mee dat het een lange dag is.

reviews.name: Rosie M
reviews.title: A MUST VISIT TRIP!!!!
reviews.comment:
This trip was absolutely fabulous!!! It’s definitely a must!!!

The tour guide spoke very good English and was friendly and approachable!! The driver drove safely!
The bus was comfortable and air conditioned. My boyfriend and I are quite tall and we found it had a comfortable amount of leg room! We made multiple stops for loo breaks and for snacks.

The tour guide in North Macedonia spoke good English and had a very good knowledge of the history and general knowledge of the area which was very interesting to listen to. She gave a list of recommendations where to find good food and local gifts.
The lake was absolutely stunning !!! Amazing over/on water restaurants and the waitress was very kind and friendly. The water was crystal clear and blue!

Overall this trip was unbelievable!!! So happy we did this!!

reviews.name: Mark Lilley
reviews.title: Great day trip to North Macedonia from Tirana
reviews.comment: Great way of seeing North Macedonia, lake Ohrid and saint Naum in one day, our guide, Eri, was very informative and laid back but he really engaged with the group. Thank you Eri!

reviews.name: Benoit M
reviews.title: Avis positif
reviews.comment: Très belle expérience à e une guide sympathique et compétente. A recommander à ceux qui souhaitent découvrir la plus belle ville de Macédoine du Nord.

reviews.name: Lala T
reviews.title: Esperienza da fare
reviews.comment:
Bellissima esperienza, accompagnata da Nolan che è stato una guida perfetta, molto solare e disponibile nel dare spiegazioni. Ha reso le lunghe ore di viaggio "meno lunghe"
Grazie anche a Philip, molto cordiale e pronto a soddisfare le nostre curiosità.
Grazie di tutto!

reviews.name: lubaluba
reviews.title: An enjoyable day.
reviews.comment:
Travelled as a party of 3.
We were met on time at designated place. We asked for the front seats of mini bus as 2 of the party are quite tall. This was accommodated for us. The driver took care with his driving and we felt safe all the time.
Nolan our guide was friendly and knowledgeable and pointed out interesting things on the way.
Ohrid was a beautiful place and perhaps you need more then a day
All our party had a great time and I can recommend this trip.
It is a long day but worth it.

reviews.name: nereaperezarcos
reviews.title: Absolutely recommended!! Wonderful day trip
reviews.comment: Incredible experience, we loved it!! We had a wonderful day discovering Lake Ohrid &St Baum in North Macedonia from Tirana. Everything was amazing, well organized and with explanations at all stops. Our guide Nolan was great, he made everything so easy and gave us interesting insights from the different places we saw. This day trip is totally worth it and would definitely recommend it to anyone wanting to discover North Macedonia!!

reviews.name: Chung Y
reviews.title: Great day trip
reviews.comment: Excellent day trip from Tirana. The old town and lake were beautiful, as was the monastery at Saint Naum. Shoutout to Nolan for being an awesome guide and keeping things on track with a large group. It does end up being a bit of a long day but totally worth it!

reviews.name: Arthur GAUTHIER
reviews.title: Excellent day trip in Ohrid
reviews.comment:
It was a wonderful day in Ohrid and Saint-Maur monastry ! It is magnificient places, it deserve to be see once a life.

I advise to anybody on holiday in Tirana, to make that tour with Albania Inbound. The bus was confortable for the day trip.

Nolan was a perfect guide. He gives good informations about the places visited, and instructions for the group was clear.

reviews.name: Anji
reviews.title: Lovely day trip
reviews.comment:
Nolan was the perfect host, from start to finish - excellent communication before the event to arrange pick up. It’s a long journey, but the lake is well worth it - very beautiful

We didn’t manage to get to the national park due to time constraints but had a lovely day and was a good use of time during our visit to Albania

reviews.name: Alaa Haziem
reviews.title: Highly recommended!
reviews.comment:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Absolutely breathtaking experience in Ohrid today – the lake and old town are magical!
The guide was fantastic, blending history with beautiful views at every stop.
A perfect day trip that I’ll never forget – highly recommended!

reviews.name: Natalie A R
reviews.title: Good trip.
reviews.comment: Good trip. Friendly Guide. Nice way to see a new country . I was here with my daughter(14 years old ) she enjoy it as well. Thank you

reviews.name: Madeline T
reviews.title: Sights to remember
reviews.comment:
This trip was really fun. Well organised and got to see some truly beautiful sights. I really loved Ohrid and also the lake at the monastery stop. I only wish there was more time to relax at the lake near the monastery as the water was so beautiful and inviting.
Nolan was really fun, responsive and engaging with good communication and kept everything running on time.
I highly recommend this trip from Tirana. It was a great day out

reviews.name: Dfabiano
reviews.title: Sensacional
reviews.comment: Adorei a Excursão, principalmente a visita a Fortaleza pela manhã e aos mosteiro ortodoxo pela tarde.Só queria ter ficado mais e ter tempo de fazer um passeio pelo lago.

reviews.name: Arturs Z
reviews.title: Recommended tour
reviews.comment: Was an amazing experience, it is a long trip, but worth it. The guide was really nice and took care of all of us. Shared good insights and special places that weren’t on the list.

reviews.name: Carles R
reviews.title: Preciosa excursion
reviews.comment: El guia magnifico. Amable y detallista. Impecable. Una muy agradable e interesante excursion. Totalmente recomendable

reviews.name: Stephan Schreiner
reviews.title: Fabelhaft
reviews.comment: Es war eine sehr schöne Tour, wunderschöne Altstadt an traumhaften See. Schwimmen in sant naum war fabelhaft in diesem riesigen See

reviews.name: john s
reviews.title: Well worth a visit. A great day out.
reviews.comment: A nice relaxing day with a superb tour guide. Excellent English and very knowledgable. He even brought back my phone that I stupidly left in his tour coach. Superb from start to finish. Many thanks!

reviews.name: Juliana Paulino
reviews.title: Día completo para conocer rápido vale la pena
reviews.comment: Es un viaje tantito largo en carretera , me pareció lejos pero valió la pena ir conocer ese nuevo país , nueva cultura , nuevas fotos de recuerdos .

reviews.name: Chuck D
reviews.title: Don't miss this 5 star tour!
reviews.comment: Incredible driver & tour guide made this a fun, informative and special tour for us. These 2 guys were both so friendly and the guide answered all our questions. He was extremely knowledgeable about the castle, the monastery & Lake Ohrid. Great day and experience worth every penny!

reviews.name: CINDY P
reviews.title: Excellent day trip from Tirana to Lake Ohrid and St. Naum
reviews.comment:
Our tour from Tirana to Lake Ohrid was incredible, but what truly made it unforgettable was our guide, Nolan. From the moment we met, it was clear we were in great hands. Warm, welcoming, and deeply knowledgeable, he brought the history, culture, and spirit of the region to life in a way no guidebook ever could.

Nolan had the perfect balance of professionalism and personal touch – always attentive to the group’s needs, sharing fascinating stories and local legends with such passion that we felt completely immersed in the experience.

What stood out most was their genuine love for the area and the people.

We left the tour not only more informed, but truly inspired.

If you’re booking a tour with Albania Inbound, ask for Nolan.

reviews.name: KBevPhoto
reviews.title: Perfect way to make the day trip
reviews.comment:
This was a solid day trip from Tirane. The group was actually split into two vehicles - one group, which I think was 4-5 people were in a small van. We were 3 and in a midsize SUV. It was comfortable enough and made the drive a lot easier.

We drove direct to Ohrid and met a local dude who did a nice job on a walking tour of the town. They also suggested some spots for lunch when it was done before we started the trip back with 2 stops along the way. this was well worth it, and without a giant bus, it almost felt like a private tour.

reviews.name: Tourist
reviews.title: Sightseeing
reviews.comment: Nolan was excellent tour guide. I enjoyed visiting lake ochrid. Beautiful scenery and excellent food. Well worth visiting.

reviews.name: Ray
reviews.title: Such a great time
reviews.comment: Loved it. Had a great time. Great guides. Very informative. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Mutlaq
reviews.title: Worth the visit
reviews.comment: Great day trip with Nolan, lovely views and great company, definitely worth the visit, and a great walking tour in Ohrid.

reviews.name: Kimberly
reviews.title: Would definitely do it again
reviews.comment: Nolan was a great guide. Knowledgable and welcoming. Would definetly recommend this experience. Thank you!

reviews.name: sheereen
reviews.title: Glad I booked this
reviews.comment: Excellent tour. Nolan is a good tour guide. Macedonia is beautiful. I’m so glad I booked this tour, a bit pricey but worth it!

reviews.name: Jessica
reviews.title: Totally worth the long hours
reviews.comment: Fantastic trip! Long day so be prepared but it was fantastic!

reviews.name: Svetlana
reviews.title: Very interesting and smooth trip
reviews.comment: It was really wonderful trip. Very interesting program, super guides - Nolan and Martina. Everything was well organized. I will recommend this tour to my friends

reviews.name: devi
reviews.title: Beautiful town, great experience
reviews.comment: It was a long dat trip starting from 630am at the meeting point till almost 7pm. Lake ohrid is beautiful town and Nolan our guide is helpful in arranging the transportation, our immigration pasport checks and explaning the history of the places. It was a good trip and i enjoyed it. Thank you so much. Philip the local guide in Lake ohrid is also informative and helpful in suggesting places where to eat and shop. Overall i enjoyed it. Thank you again!

reviews.name: Minh Ha
reviews.title: Lovely and helpful guides
reviews.comment: Thanks for the remarkable trip. Our tour guide Nolan was very nice and helpful 🥰 also the cute tour guide in North Macedonia (sorry for forgetting your name). We got know to history and interesting facts during the trip.

reviews.name: Elizabeth
reviews.title: Ohrid is absolutely beautiful
reviews.comment: Wonderful day trip from Tirana to North Macedonia. Great way to see another country! Ohrid is so beautiful. Of note there is some walking involved. We had someone in our group that struggled with hills in town. Our guide tailored the tour for them so we had to break away to see more including Samuel Fortress with limited time we had but this worked out ok because we had some free time at that stop. Border crossing was easy. It was a stunning trip and well worth it! Would highly recommend!

reviews.name: Andrea
reviews.title: Great experience with this company
reviews.comment: We had a fantastic day trip to N. Macedonia with our guide Nolan. Communication was excellent regarding pick ups and also during the day re meeting places and timings for lunch etc. The local guide at Lake Ohrid was enthusiastic and knowledgeable too. Our driver was fantastic - we always felt safe on the road. A long day that was well worth the trip with this company to see and experience a new place. Thank you for a great day!!

reviews.name: Simon
reviews.title: Beautiful and interesting town
reviews.comment: Visiting North Macedonia was very special, lake Ohrid is spectacular and the surrounding town was very interesting and beautiful, the monastery we visited was very interesting

reviews.name: Sai
reviews.title: Highly recommend this trip
reviews.comment: My Day trip to Lake Ohrid was fabulous, Then guide was in time. The trip is really worth taking. The pics don’t justify the beauty of the place.

reviews.name: Gil
reviews.title: Great experience in Macedonia
reviews.comment: Nolan was a great guide he told us alot of information about macedonia, The driver was a true professional with the complicated roads in macdonia and albania, very fun and ohrid and st naum monestry is very beautiful

reviews.name: Khathu
reviews.title: A perfect day from Tirana
reviews.comment: Indrit was an exception tour guide. He catered to all our needs and was very engaging. The tour was worth every penny, North Macedonia was absolutely beautiful and the local guide was really informative. I would definitely recommend, especially if you are in Tirana- you are basically getting the opportunity to visit another additional country with spectacular views.

reviews.name: Linda
reviews.title: Perfect day exploring
reviews.comment: Wonderful sites and good historical information provided. Nolan and Marina were professional and friendly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Lauren
reviews.title: Would definitely book again
reviews.comment: Our guide was Nolan and our driver was Besim and they were both so lovely. They made sure everything ran smoothly and we were able to see so much in the time we were there. We also had a guide called Martina who gave us a walking tour of Ohrid which was amazing as we were able to see all the important points and learn the history. I highly recommend this tour and would definitely book again!

reviews.name: Owain
reviews.title: Friendly and welcoming experience
reviews.comment: It was brilliant! Worth every cent. The guide Nolan was great, as well as our guide in Macedonia. The route and itinerary are well thought out with plenty of photo opportunities. The amount of time in Ohrid was great and everyone was very friendly. Definitely recommend to all.

reviews.name: Alfie
reviews.title: Trustworthy company, unlike the last one!
reviews.comment: Had a fantastic day. We had the nightmare of booking with another tour company the day before and it turned out to be a scam. They took us to the border and then told us they hadn’t got the right documents to cross the border and kept the money we paid. This tour however was amazing. Nolan was informative and helpful. The driver was incredible and getting the bus to Ohrid safely. The tour guide in Ohrid was lovely and knowledgeable and the city of Ohrid was one of the most beautiful places I have ever visited. If you want to go, book with this company.

reviews.name: Isaac
reviews.title: Relaxed and enjoyed the views
reviews.comment: Such an amazing trip to Ohrid from Tirana today! Nolan was fantastic as a guide and helped transportation and the tour go smoothly which allowed me to truly relax amd enjoy the beauty of Ohrid!

reviews.name: Léah
reviews.title: Couldn’t have imagined a better trip
reviews.comment: I could not have imagined better ! 100% recommend Some stops were short (as said in the info) but the guides Anest and Martina always made sure we could do and see everything we wanted. They were the nicest and kindest persons you could hope for, and they shared so much about their cultures and history (Macedonia for Martina, Albania for Anest). The Ohrid tour was about 1 hour and 1,5/2 hours for the free time. The tour with Martina felt like walking around with a new friend. We left right on time, the drive is approximatively 3 hours depending on the traffic and the border. You need to make absolutely sure that you have the appropriate documents to go into North Macedonia according to your nationality : one of the guests was stuck at the border, even though Anest did absolutely everything he could to find a solution and tried to help him find transportation back (which he didn't have to do according to the info). Bonus point : Anest might be the smoothest driver in all Albania !

reviews.name: Jingchen
reviews.title: Kind, calm, and responsible
reviews.comment: Our Albanian guide Anest was amazing, he is responsible, kind and calm, gave us good time to explore during the whole tour and shared a lot about Albania on the way back. The local guide M is very sweet and showed us around Ohrid. It is such a great city, we were all considering coming back to it for more days! The lake gives peace to all viewers.

reviews.name: Michelle
reviews.title: Great experience overall
reviews.comment: We absolutely loved the tour and our guide Henri did a great job handling a stressful situation with our bus. Ended up being a much longer day than expected due to vehicle issues but we weren’t too fussed and the tour itself was well worth it!

reviews.name: Lea Anna
reviews.title: Absolutely wonderful North Macedonia tour
reviews.comment: We had an absolutely wonderful experience exploring North Macedonia on Saturday, August 30th. A huge thank you to our incredible guides Nolan, Flori, and Martina! They were beyond attentive, patient, and genuinely enthusiastic, answering every question we had and making sure we felt completely at ease throughout the day. Their knowledge, warmth, and professionalism made the tour truly memorable, and it was clear they cared deeply about sharing the beauty and history of the region with us. We couldn’t have asked for better guides, highly recommend!

reviews.name: VeShannah
reviews.title: Beautiful city, definitely want to return
reviews.comment: This was an amazing day trip! We had great weather, a great group, and great tour leaders. Our guide for this tour was Nolan, and our driver was Flouri. Our guide in Ohrid was Martina. They were all amazing. Nolan did an excellent job of making sure we were well informed of pickup times and locations. And he did a great job of informing us about the sites we were visiting. I absolutely loved having the opportunity to visit another country on a day trip from Tirana. I have been wanting to go to North Macedonia ever since seeing the Microsoft screensaver of the Church of St. John at Kaneo, and honestly, I had no idea that yesterday's visit would lead to visiting that site, so I was overwhelmed with joy at climbing that hill, then seeing it. Ohrid was such a pretty city, and I definitely need to return and spend more time there. I highly recommend this tour and I hope you get guides as great as Nolan and Martina.

reviews.name: Martha
reviews.title: Outstanding guide, Noli!
reviews.comment: Noli is an outstanding tour guide! His communication was excellent from start to finish—clear, organized, and caring. He coordinated my transportation so smoothly, kept us informed at every stop, and made sure everyone had time to explore and enjoy. What impressed me most was how he personally ensured I got safely back to my hotel, even following up afterward. I especially enjoyed walking around the city of Ohrid, learning its history, and meeting some of the locals—it was the highlight of the day. The only improvement I’d suggest is that the van be given a good wash and the windows and windshield cleaned inside and out, so the ride feels fresher and the views are even better.

reviews.name: Colleen
reviews.title: Amazing day trip!
reviews.comment: What an amazing day! Tony did an awesome job of navigating us safely to and from the various sites. And Nolan was a wealth of knowledge, sharing wonderful tidbits of information along the way. A jam-packed day, with the perfect amount of touring and “down” time. And lunch in Ohrid was incredible! Highly recommend this tour!

reviews.name: Vitalii
reviews.title: Enjoyed exploring the city
reviews.comment: The tour was really good with a mix of history and free time to enjoy the city and what it can offers. And the guide were very good and helpful. Recommend it!

reviews.name: Diane
reviews.title: One of my favorite trips
reviews.comment: Our guide was wonderful. Very informative and knowledgeable. This trip was one of my favorites. It definitely was worth the money . The places we we t to we’re awesome

reviews.name: Marsida
reviews.title: Very hospitable and attentive team
reviews.comment: We had a great time visiting North Macedonia from Tirana on this tour. Nolan was a great tour guide. He provided us with ample information about the locations, gave us recommendations about coffee places, etc. Both Nolan and Sula (the driver), as well as the tour company (Albania inbound), were very hospitable. In fact, one of the travelers on our tour had difficulty finding our meeting point, and they ensured that she made it at our meeting point so as not to miss the tour. Definitely recommend this tour!

reviews.name: Silvia
reviews.title: Amazing views in North Macedonia
reviews.comment: Nolan, the tourist guide was knowledgeable and clear in his communication. North Macedonia tour views and history were fantastic!

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.title: Great experience exploring the country
reviews.comment: I really enjoyed my time in North Macedonia, Nolan was a great guide and made sure we maximised our time. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.name: Amber-Lee
reviews.title: Felt like a road trip with friends
reviews.comment: Henri is a great guide. He has a great sense of humour and made an effort to get to know each of us as it was a small group of 7 people. He made it feel more like a road trip with friends rather than a paid tour. There were some delays at the border due to high traffic but this is to be expected in August. Henri has great knowledge for the areas we visited. It was a great day with some amazing places and views! Thanks for a great day! All the best, Amber & Jess.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.title: Guide went above and beyond
