reviews.comment: Guide was so so helpful and tried to get me to the airport on time! The tour itself was really good and informative about history. Very knowledgeable and helpful in every way!! Timing should be made a bit clearer as seems so variable!

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.title: Lovely one-day trip
reviews.comment: Very nice one-day trip to a neighboring North Macedonia. Scenic views of the lake Ohrid. The guide, Nolan, is very pleasant and doing his best. Local guide in Ohrid walked us around and provided nice tips about where to eat and where to shop. Way back was long but this is outside of control of the guide or the driver: there was a line on Albanian border and some traffic.

reviews.name: Anne
reviews.title: Excellent tour
reviews.comment: It was excellent and the guide as well as the driver showed lots of patience during the whole day to make sure we'd have an amazing experience

reviews.name: Natasha
reviews.title: Noli made everyone feel included
reviews.comment: Guide Noli, along with our driver, was very friendly, helpful and knowledgeable about our beautiful destination. We were in a group of six with three different nationalities, but he made sure everyone was included. We would recommend him highly. He also speaks Italian, which could be good to know for some of you!

reviews.name: Morinsola
reviews.title: Learned so much about the area
reviews.comment: It was a fantastic trip beyond what words can describe. The opportunity to see a whole new country in just one day as facilitated by Henri the best guide ever alongside a wonderful group that had all the continents of the world represented, this trip was the highlight of my entire stay in Albania, and Henri was a fantastic guide, full of knowledge about the area and curiosity about all of us that travelled with him that day.

reviews.name: Daphne
reviews.comment: Nolan and the driver Alto were really really Nice. Nolan also knew a lot of stuff and could answer all the questions you had during the day. We were on the daytrip with a small Group of only six people and we had the most fun time with each other. 10/10 would recommend!!

reviews.name: Vatan
reviews.title: Awesome day in Ohrid
reviews.comment: Had an awesome day in Ohrid thanks to our friendly guide Nolan and our driver. Nolan was very knowledgeable and had a great sense of humour. And the driver was excellent! Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Rajat
reviews.title: Best tour in North Macedonia
reviews.comment: If you want to visit one of the most visited and most beautiful parts of North Macedonia, this is hands down, the best tour...our guide, Nolan was prompt, funny, a great storyteller and considerate..he messaged us the night before regarding pick up time things to keep for our trip...pick up was on time, van was comfortable, group was small arnd 10-12 pax and drive was great...the local guide in Ohrid, Martina was equally good and gave us a very good tour of the old town...the free time was also sufficient for lunch and sightseeing...other stops were equally good and beautiful...even the border crossing was smooth...Nolan took all our passports and got cleared without anyone getting down from the bus...would surely recommend.

reviews.name: Amy
reviews.title: Would recommend to everyone
reviews.comment: 5 stars for my guide Henri🙏, he was fun and give clear detailed descriptions about many sightseeings in Macedonia. i can recommandent this tour to everybody!

reviews.name: Алина Горощук
reviews.title: Wonderful and comfortable tour
reviews.comment:
Yesterday we went on a tour from Tirana to the city of Ohrid in North Macedonia. It was a wonderful and very comfortable experience, with an amazing guide named Anest. He was extremely attentive and answered all of our questions. We really appreciated how well-planned and thoughtfully designed the route was, down to every detail.

The views of Lake Ohrid and the surrounding mountains were especially breathtaking. We traveled all the way around the lake, both on the Albanian and Macedonian sides. On the way back, we also visited the Monastery of Saint Naum, which has an impressive history and a truly special atmosphere.

We absolutely loved the tour and would give it more than 5 stars if that were possible 😁🌟
Our guide made this experience truly unforgettable.

reviews.name: Scott
reviews.title: Perfect day from start to finish
reviews.comment: Today’s trip to Northern Macedonia was tremendous with Noli. The trip was excellent from start to finish and I would recommend Noli and the driver to anyone looking to book. We are over from the UK and the guys were informative, friendly and helpful. GIVE THEM BOTH A BONUS!

reviews.name: George B
reviews.title: Exellent Day Trip
reviews.comment: Our Guide Elton took us from Tirana to lake Ohrid. We did a full circle of lake Ohrid seeing Ohird Town, Monastery of Saint Naum, Beach of Bones and Drilon Park. This was one of the highlight of our trip to Albania. Would highly recommend visiting this site. Thank you Elton.

reviews.name: George B
reviews.title: Exellent Day Trip
reviews.comment: Our Guide Elton took us from Tirana to lake Ohrid. We did a full circle of lake Ohrid seeing Ohird Town, Monastery of Saint Naum, Beach of Bones and Drilon Park. This was one of the highlight of our trip to Albania. Would highly recommend visiting this site. Thank you Elton.

reviews.name: GC99
reviews.title: Amazing trip
reviews.comment:
Very good trip and good idea to visit Macedonia. Worth the time and money. I had a great time!
Recommended if you are in Tirana.

reviews.name: Manolis
reviews.title: Magnificent places and guide
reviews.comment:
Excellent tour, well organized and covering all the attractions of the area!

Henri is great, very helpful with all group members, provided useful information about the places visited and great company throughout the tour!

reviews.name: Andrew W
reviews.title: Beautiful Day
reviews.comment: The trip was very beautiful. Our tour guide showed us around Ohrid. Ohrid is very beautiful everyone should visit while in Albania.

reviews.name: Heather P
reviews.title: Great trip to a new country.
reviews.comment: We are having a great time! Nolan gave us a great tour of Ohrid from the church to the town and the fortress. Lunch was delish in a cute restaurant. Highly recommend. He also took lots of pics of us with our phone. Very kind.

reviews.name: Samantha C
reviews.title: 5/5 Experience with Nolan
reviews.comment: I had an amazing trip with Nolan. He was very kind the whole time and made sure that everything was going well for the trip. Ohrid is a beautiful place that is well worth visiting from Tirana.

reviews.name: D S
reviews.title: Great Ohrid Tour
reviews.comment: We spent a very nice day at beautiful lake Ohrid with Nolan. He was very friendly and knowledgeable about the area. Would recommend!

reviews.name: Shin Tang
reviews.title: Just Amazing
reviews.comment: it is a wonderful day trip to Ohrid. My guide is Henri, he is very nice and friendly! He gave us the enough time to enjoy the day and the view. He led us to the best view point of Ohrid!

reviews.name: Samah K
reviews.title: North Macedonia day trip
reviews.comment: Excellent tour. Nolan was a wonderful guide, very calm and a good driver. Nice to see, Ohrid especially the lake and the fortress.

reviews.name: Kara M
reviews.title: Traveler beware
reviews.comment:
Beautiful scenery but overall bad experience because of poor communication and planning. Group was 30% more people than advertised (25 instead of 19). Yes, we had a more comfortable bus, but more people meant everything took longer. Less space to hear the guides talk; many people weren’t able to see the paper making demonstration. Crossing the border took about 30 min of sitting in the bus, each way.

Guide messaged me at 20:20 the night before with pickup time, which was 6:30am; some were picked up even earlier. Poor communication of pick up time (late night notification happened to others) didn’t allow time to plan for breakfast; morning stops we had didn’t offer anything nutritious.

No WiFi on the bus. My day between pick up and drop off was nearly 14 hours.

reviews.name: Aurora
reviews.title: Albania è bellissima
reviews.comment: Ksamil è una zona dell’Albania davvero splendida. Il mare è cristallino e le persone sono molto accoglienti. Il cibo è ottimo, un po’ diverso da quello italiano, ma comunque delizioso. Bisogna fare attenzione ai prezzi per i turisti, che a volte possono essere più alti. L’Albania, in generale, è un paese meraviglioso, con mari e montagne spettacolari e laghi e fiumi limpidi come cristallo. Una destinazione da non perdere.

reviews.name: Elodie Laurent
reviews.title: Perfect for sunsets and exploration
reviews.comment: Ksamil is a lively and vibrant holiday town, offering a wide range of accommodations, restaurants, bars, and cafés. The locals are honest, friendly, and helpful. The beaches are well-maintained, with affordable sunbeds and excellent service. The views are stunning, and all the scenic hotspots are nearby. I highly recommend taking an Albania tour for a sunset trip to the Blue Eye Lake and watching the sunset at Lëkurrezi Castle. Anest, our tour guide, is knowledgeable, friendly, and very helpful.

reviews.name: Ingrid Johansson
reviews.title: Amazing tour from start to finish
reviews.comment: Amazing experience! The tour of Saranda and the Ksamil was beautiful, with stunning scenery and crystal-clear waters. Anest, our guide, were friendly and helpful, and the pace of the tour was just right. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Amara S
reviews.title: Great tour highly recommended
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning! Swimming in the turquoise waters of Ksamil and walking around Saranda was unforgettable. Great tour, great guides, great day!

reviews.name: Valentina P
reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.comment: This day tour with Albania Inbound is perfect for anyone wanting to see Saranda and the Ksamil Islands. The scenery is breathtaking, the schedule is relaxed, and our guide, Anest  was knowledgeable and very friendly. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Taylor Q
reviews.title: A hidden gem
reviews.comment: The water has a unique color and looks just as stunning as in the photos. Visiting was definitely worth it, and going out of season made it much quieter and more peaceful.

reviews.name: Laurence
reviews.title: Worth the trip
reviews.comment: Very interesting culture. Coming from the US, we’ve always been curious to see and experience what life was like in post-communist countries and how the culture has evolved over time. This tour made the trip absolutely worthwhile.

reviews.name: Jessica
reviews.title: Well-organized and memorable experience
reviews.comment: The Full Balkan tour was a great way to see many countries in a relatively short time. The route was intense but rewarding, with beautiful cities, interesting cultural stops, and diverse landscapes along the way. Some days felt a bit long, but the overall experience was well balanced and memorable. The organization was solid and the guide did a good job keeping the group on track. A very good choice for travelers who want a broad Balkan experience.

reviews.name: Jacob
reviews.title: A perfect Balkan adventure
reviews.comment: Ten days flew by while exploring some of the most beautiful and diverse corners of the Balkans. Every day brought something new, from vibrant cities to peaceful landscapes and rich local culture. The tour felt smooth and well-paced, never rushed, and the guide made the experience even more enjoyable with great stories and helpful tips. A perfect choice for travelers who want variety, authenticity, and unforgettable memories in one trip.

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.title: Exceeded all expectations
reviews.comment: This 10-day Balkan tour was an amazing journey through diverse cultures, stunning landscapes, and fascinating history. Each day was well planned, with the perfect balance between guided visits and free time to explore. A special thanks goes to our guide, Noli, whose knowledge, professionalism, and friendly attitude made the entire experience even more memorable. His stories, local insights, and attention to every detail helped us truly understand and appreciate each destination. The organization was excellent, accommodations were comfortable, and transportation was smooth throughout the trip. This tour exceeded all expectations and offered a deep, authentic experience of the Balkans. Highly recommended to anyone looking for a well-organized, enriching, and unforgettable Balkan adventure!

reviews.name: Olsi H
reviews.title: Memorable trip of the Balkans
reviews.comment: Just an amazing experience! Never thought I could cover 3 countries in 3 days. Very interesting sites we visited. Thanks to our 1 in 1000000 guide we learned so much about Albania and had a blast. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Thomas B
reviews.title: Enthralling Journey Through 3 Countries: A Testament to Exceptional Guiding in Balkans
reviews.comment:
Our three-day excursion through Prizren and Pristina (Kosovo, day 1), Ohrid and Skopje (Macedonia, day 2), and Berat (Albania, day 3) was an absolute whirlwind of discovery, thanks to our incredible guide! Their extensive knowledge and passion for the region's history and culture made every moment truly come alive.

Our guide's professionalism, friendliness, and expertise transformed this trip into an enriching adventure. Its ability to cater to our interests while showcasing the best of each location was remarkable. He was our private driver, guide and picture maker for amazing memories ! We can't recommend him enough for anyone seeking an immersive and captivating journey through these stunning destinations!

reviews.name: Nolan H
reviews.title: Fantastic tour with fantastic guide
reviews.comment:
Henri was a great guide we really had fun with him and the places were great
he really got deep into the fascinating albanian history shared a lot of interesting facts about the ancient albanian/illyrian history
After our 3 day Balkan tour with him we really feel like we know something more about Albania and Kosova

Thank you very much Henri for accompanying us and we wish you luck with your work!

reviews.name: Vacation51161961302
reviews.title: Amazing 3 Days exploring the Balkans
reviews.comment:
This 3-day Balkan tour was an amazing experience! Everything was well organized and we managed to see so much in a short time. The landscapes, cities, and cultural insights were impressive. Our guide Noli was outstanding, very knowledgeable, friendly, and passionate, which made the journey even more enjoyable.
Highly recommended for anyone looking for a smooth and memorable Balkan getaway.

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.title: Henri made our trip great
reviews.comment: Henri was helpful, fun and really took care of us throughout our trip. He was highly knowledgeable about all the places we visited, and we appreciated his flexibility, ensuring we could make the best use of our time.

reviews.name: J
reviews.title: Fun, knowledgeable, and professional guide
reviews.comment: Our three-day excursion through Prizren and Pristina (Kosovo, day 1), Ohrid and Skopje (Macedonia, day 2), and Berat (Albania, day 3) was an absolute whirlwind of discovery, thanks to our incredible guide, Henri! His extensive knowledge and passion for the region's history and culture made every moment truly come alive. Our guide's professionalism, friendliness, and expertise transformed this trip into an enriching adventure. His ability to cater to our interests while showcasing the best of each location was remarkable. He was our private driver, guide and picture maker for amazing memories ! We can't recommend him enough for anyone seeking an immersive and captivating journey through these stunning destinations!

reviews.name: Thomas
reviews.title: A vibrant and exciting trip
reviews.comment: Our three-day adventure through Saint Naum, Ohrid, Skopje, Prizren, Pristina and Kruja was an absolute blast, all thanks to our amazing guide! Their deep knowledge and passion for the region's history and culture made everything so much more vibrant and exciting. From being our driver and guide to snapping some awesome photos for memories, they went above and beyond. Their professionalism, friendliness, and ability to tailor the experience to our interests made the trip unforgettable. If you're looking for an immersive and unforgettable journey through these gorgeous spots, we can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.name: John
reviews.title: Lots to see in a short time
reviews.comment: Amazing trip with Anest through three Balkan countries in 3 days. An excellent way to see almost all of Macedonia and Kosovo (what is worth) and a portion of Albania. I would recommend this tour to anyone that wants to see a lot in a short time span.

reviews.name: Maria
reviews.title: Excellent support and guidance
reviews.comment: Anest always made sure we had what we needed and was very quick to manage any concerns that came up. He kept an eye on everyone without ever making things feel too much, especially with everything we were already taking in. Thanks Anest for a great vacation!

reviews.name: Natalie
reviews.title: An experience I’ll never forget
reviews.comment: The best tour I’ve ever had ! Our guide was great and made the experience truly unforgettable.

reviews.name: Drupal
reviews.title: Good guide, but itinerary had issues
reviews.comment: The itinerary was well curated however we did not cover everything written on the itinerary, partially because some of the sights were closed during this time of the year. In some instances the tour guide was surprised the itinerary I was given at the time of booking had things included that they usually don’t cover, so it was disappointing we didn’t cover them. I escalated this to the tour operator during the trip but they didn’t respond, which was surprising as they were quick to respond to my questions at the time of booking. I was also let down on one of the accommodation. The tour guide informed me that they probably had to put me in alternative hotel as they didn’t have availability in the usual one. The room had spider webs, broken bathroom door, rude staff, and no water/tea/coffee in the room. The tour guide was nice and friendly however I didn’t appreciate the tour guide was overly accommodating to the preferences of the other two (mother and daughter), covering/excluding/rushing things as they demanded, at the detriment of the itinerary.

reviews.name: Sophia
reviews.title: Easy and enjoyable trip
reviews.comment: The tour was nicely organized and easy to enjoy. We visited some interesting places and still had enough free time to explore on our own. The guide and transportation were reliable, which made the trip stress-free. Overall, it was a pleasant experience and a good way to see a bit of the Balkans in a short time.

reviews.name: John Sheridan
reviews.title: Great value and enjoyable experience
reviews.comment:
Albania Inbound were so reassuring from first contact and do alot of bespoke Balkins tour planning.

Huge complements to Henri and Genand on being excellent guides. We did the 3 day Balkins tour of Albania, North Macedonia & Kosovo with Henri and we subsequently got a private transfer with Genand for the long journey to Montenegro.

Henri is excellent for history and politics giving an honest local perspective while being so organised and helpful at all times. The 3 day tour was good value, relaxed, flexible but we saw so much across the Balkins. The hotels on the trip were very comfortable and central in Ohrid, North Macedonia and Pristina, Kosovo. Nothing was too much a request for Henri and he really was an excellent guide.

Separately we had a long journey (10hours) in alot of bad traffic from Tirana in Albania to Kotor in Montenegro with Genand. He was brilliant fun and we really enjoyed the adventure of the long journey with good humour!

reviews.name: Giulia Colombo
reviews.title: Ottima guida e tour organizzato
reviews.comment: Io ed il mio compagno abbiamo fatto un tour dei Balcani tra Albania, Macedonia e Kosovo. Abbiamo adorato tutto. Henry è stato fantastico, bravo ed informato su tutto. We had comfy transport, great places to eat, and enough free time to explore at our own pace. Every day felt well planned but not rushed, and I got to see a side of Albania I’d never have found on my own.

Highly recommend this tour, especially with Henry! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Driver/Tour Guide: Henri, our guide was outstanding—knowledgeable, friendly, and a great driver. He made our trip truly special. Lots of interesting insight he shared and nice conversation along the way. Highlights: We explored vibrant cities, stunning landscapes, traditional markets, beautiful beaches, and a renowned national park and UNESCO World Heritage sites. Each day was filled with unforgettable experiences. Overall, this tour was a fantastic way to see all of the country in just 10 days. Highly recommended!

reviews.comment: We joined the tour without really knowing what to expect, and it turned out to be one of the most rewarding trips we’ve ever done. Albania surprised us every single day. The route was smartly designed, taking us from vibrant cities to remote villages, dramatic mountain landscapes and peaceful seaside spots. Nothing felt rushed, and there was enough time to truly enjoy each destination rather than just “tick it off a list”. A special mention goes to our guide, Henri, who truly made this journey stand out. His knowledge, passion, and friendly attitude created a relaxed atmosphere from day one. Thanks to his stories and local insights, every place felt alive and meaningful. This tour is ideal for travelers who want more than photos, it offers real experiences, local culture and genuine hospitality. Ten days flew by, and we left with memories we’ll carry for a long time. Highly recommended.

Henri from the start till the end made sure we were well taken care off.. Even though we were on the road for long hours, the journey was comfortable.. An extra star for Henri's driving skills!!!

We had enough of time at every place.. Thanks to Henri - Never a dull moment! We had the best time!!

reviews.name: Gauri
reviews.title: Albania all the way!
reviews.comment:
We customised our family trip to Albania with this company and really enjoyed it! Nolan (our guide, local expert, chauffeur, good humoured all-rounder) demonstrated resourcefulness beyond his experience by supporting us throughout the tour, ensuring it was a smooth process as we transitioned between locations without complaint.

Nolan is open to foreigners and full of helpful tips and pieces of information related to the sights and happenings. We felt confident as he is prompt, attentive and knows his way around. He would offer WiFi hotspots, meal suggestions, alternative routes to optimise time and destinations and reassured us as visitors to a new country.

We learned a lot about local practices and saw unexplored and off the beaten track areas with Nolan. Wish you all the success ahead as you share beautiful elements of your country with others - and balance your education and work with skill.

Some days had quite a lot of driving, but only to be expected when we covered so much of Albania. Would highly recommend- so much less stressful than hiring a car. We were a middle- aged couple, and then there were two younger single people in the tour- we all got on very well, so would be a fab trip for single people.

reviews.name: Jerry W
reviews.title: 1st class tour operator. 1st class country!
reviews.comment:
1st class tour operator. We did the 5 day north and south Albania tour, which was a great way to see a lot of the country.

Our tour guide was Anest, who was very knowledgeable about all aspects of the country - history, culture, current situation, food and drink etc.

Nothing was too much trouble, and he made sure we enjoyed the trip.

Inevitably there is quite a bit of driving, but the roads are pretty good (especially compared to those here in the UK), and he drove well. The scenery was stunning.

We stayed in various hotels, and they were all fine, some very new. The whole country is gearing up for tourism, with investment in high quality infrastructure.

Finally, the country is safe. I have travelled in many countries around the world and Albania is certainly a safe place for tourists. This is because the culture is to welcome visitors, and as the country continues to develop from a dark past, the people appreciate the benefit of tourism to their economy.

reviews.comment:
Highly recommend visiting this magical spot and enjoying the stunning views. There’s a 30-minute hike to a viewpoint, which I did with my 4.5-year-old son—he loved it and thought it was both beautiful and adventurous. I checked with the homestay and restaurant owner before heading up for advice.

It’s doable with little ones, but careful supervision is a must. We stayed one night at Lake Bovilla, as that was all that was available. If we return, we’d definitely spend three nights to fully enjoy this fantastic place.

reviews.name: Jackob C
reviews.title: Beautiful lake with stunning views
reviews.comment: This artificial lake, perched at around 1000 m in the mountains, is definitely worth a visit. You can reach it via a coach track using a 4×4 or SUV. There’s a high-altitude restaurant and bar nearby, and a short walk from there leads to a suspended platform...perfect for capturing stunning photos.

reviews.name: Louise
reviews.title: A mountain escape
reviews.comment: We spent a beautiful day here. The experience is truly rewarding, but be prepare, it’s physically demanding. You need to be fit and ready, but every step is worth it.

reviews.name: Freya
reviews.title: Breathtaking vistas
reviews.comment: A lovely lake with stunning views, though the journey isn’t easy—a long stretch of gravel road awaits. The climb to the viewpoint is challenging, especially with young children, but the breathtaking panorama makes every step worth it!

reviews.name: Chloe Kim
reviews.title: A quick escape from Tirana
reviews.comment: One of my favorite spots near Tirana, just 20 km from the capital. The hike isn’t long—even for those who don’t usually hike and the view from the top is absolutely worth it.

reviews.name: Casey Morgan
reviews.title: Stunning views
reviews.comment: A very pretty spot, best visited with a car suited for the terrain. The views are stunning—perfect for photos—and along the way, you might encounter some friendly sheep and goats.

reviews.name: Matteo
reviews.title: Climb, explore, enjoy
reviews.comment: If you’re not afraid of rough roads or uneven paths, the effort is well worth it. After a short hike of a few kilometers, the view is absolutely breathtaking! Don’t hesitate to climb the stairs to the city bridge (just €1 per person). The on-site restaurant is very welcoming and adds to the experience.

reviews.name: Giussepe B
reviews.title: Una salita che vale la pena
reviews.comment: Il Lago Bovilla è un luogo eccezionale! La strada per raggiungerlo è abbastanza stretta, ripida e un po’ lunga, il che a volte la rende impegnativa, ma lo sforzo viene davvero ricompensato. Una volta parcheggiato, la salita offre viste magnifiche lungo tutto il percorso. L’ingresso costa solo 1 € a persona, un prezzo davvero ragionevole per uno spettacolo naturale simile. Da non perdere per gli amanti dei paesaggi impressionanti!

reviews.name: Laura
reviews.title: Worth it
reviews.comment: The food was absolutely stunning...cooked to perfection! The atmosphere was super cute, and the waiter,  was incredibly welcoming and helpful. He truly made the meal even more special.

reviews.name: Chamilla
reviews.title: Absolutely beautiful
reviews.comment: Absolutely beautiful! You can either hike or drive up to the restaurant, which offers stunning views along with fantastic food and service. There’s also a short walk to an additional viewing platform on the mountain. The restaurant, cabins, and viewing platform are modern and tastefully designed. It’s a family-owned venture in partnership with the local village community. The food was excellent—definitely try the mixed starters (we enjoyed them alongside grilled meats). Truly the best meal we’ve had in Albania!

reviews.name: eva
reviews.title: Summer views you can’t miss
reviews.comment: Anyone who loves nature will absolutely adore this place, and hiking enthusiasts will enjoy it even more. The best time to experience it is in the summer.

reviews.name: Edward R
reviews.title: A peaceful place
reviews.comment: This is a hidden oasis in the mountains of Albania, a perfect place to relax and escape the chaos of city life.

reviews.name: Andrew
reviews.title: Amazing tour and guide
reviews.comment: The views and tour were amazing, but the tour guide made it absolutely wonderful! Would 100% recommend this tour!

reviews.name: GetYourGuide traveler
reviews.title: Amazing hospitality and kindness
reviews.comment: Nolan is the best . I will be going to back Albania this summer because of the hospitality and kindness

reviews.name: Cathy
reviews.title: Highly recommended experience
reviews.comment: We had a wonderful time. Our guide, Ramadan, was incredible. He was very friendly and made sure the tour was perfect. He also told us lots of interesting information about Albania and the area we visited. The castle and Shkoder are both pleasant places to walk around. We particularly liked the bridge and lunch by the lake. Highly recommended

reviews.name: Heathern
reviews.title: Unforgettable journey with Endrit
reviews.comment: Endrit is a very knowledgeable and easy going tour guide. He brought history alive with the stories he told about the places we visited as well as about Albania in general. It was great experience and the restaurant where we ate was delicious! I would highly recommend those your and Endrit as a your guide.
